author: Alexandre Branco
review_text: {"en": "Staff is the best of the Hotel, nice, professional and always willing to help. Rooms are good, but can be better. Windows do not lock, which in turn makes it very loud inside the room. Mattress is very old. The gym was the best due to the staff which I could have as PT every day! Outstanding on that!"}

author: adeyinka ryan
review_text:
{"en": "It was a very short trip but very memorable, a home away from home.
I loved the ambience and decor.
Front desk was so impressive especially a staff of yours (Babatunde), had good etiquette and was professional about his job, attending to us timely.
Customer service was impressive and as so the quality of care we received.
The room was beautiful and large.
The food was delicious with a varierty that almost threw any caution I had out the wind! I really enjoyed anything I ate.
The security was great. No one could come up to our room without thorough check
I totally enjoyed my stay. I definitely will visit again and highly recommend."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Adeyinka,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback about your stay at Radisson Blu Hotel.

We are delighted to know that your short trip was memorable and felt like a home away from home. 

Your kind words about our ambiance, food, security, and exceptional service are truly appreciated. 

We are especially pleased to hear that Babatunde made such a positive impression during your stay.

Thank you for your recommendation, and we look forward to welcoming you back again soon.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu"}}

author: Abisola Abibat
review_text: {"en": "Had a really pleasant stay recently. The room was clean, comfortable, and very relaxing. The service was excellent from check-in to check-out, and the staff were warm and professional throughout my stay.\n\nSpecial thanks to Babatunde at the Front Desk for being very helpful, polite, and attentive. He made the whole process smooth and welcoming. I’ll definitely love to visit again. 😊"}

author: summy sas
Rebecca
review_text:
{"en": "I had a pleasant stay at the Radisson Blu Ikeja. The doormen, security staff, and reception team were all very welcoming and helpful, especially Busola, who made a great impression with her friendliness and professionalism.

The hotel is modern, well maintained, and conveniently located, with plenty of amenities and attractions nearby. Housekeeping also did an excellent job each day, keeping the room clean, refreshed, and well presented throughout my stay.

My only criticisms relate to two areas. Firstly, there appeared to be a noticeable difference in the level of attention given to certain guests. Having worked in hospitality myself, I understand how staff can sometimes make assumptions about who is likely to tip well. As I was travelling with a foreign friend, the contrast in service was apparent on several occasions and with other guests staying in the hotel. I had every intention of tipping generously for good service, but these experiences unfortunately left me feeling somewhat discouraged.

Secondly, my room was located at the end of the corridor and felt quite dark due to the limited natural light. The lack of brightness made the space feel somewhat gloomy and wish there were more pillows in the room after staying 7days."}

author: Colonelz Tobby Matrix
review_text: {"en": "A Truly Memorable Stay – 5/5 Stars\n\nJust got back from a weekend at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, Lagos and honestly couldn’t have asked for a better experience. The rooms were clean, modern, and quiet, with a bed that made it hard to get up in the morning. Breakfast had plenty of options, and the pool area was perfect for unwinding after a long day out. What really made the stay stand out was the service. Special shoutout to Babatunde at the front desk. From the moment we checked in, he was warm, attentive, and went out of his way to make sure we had everything we needed. When our original room had a minor issue, he sorted us into a better one within minutes without any hassle, and even gave us great local restaurant recommendations for dinner. It’s rare to meet staff who are genuinely helpful and make you feel like a guest, not just a booking number. Because of Babatunde and the team, we’ll definitely be back. If you’re looking for a comfortable stay with staff who actually care, this is the place."}

author: The Enthusiast
review_text: {"en": "The hotel facilities were very impressive — from the relaxing ambiance to the quality of the food and overall environment. Everything felt calm, organized, and luxurious without being overwhelming. It was the perfect place to unwind and recharge.\n\nOverall, I had a wonderful experience and would gladly return again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Enthusiast,

Thank you for your kind feedback about Radisson Blu Hotel. 

We are delighted you enjoyed the relaxing ambiance, quality food, and peaceful environment. 

It is wonderful to know your stay was perfect for unwinding and recharging.

We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
Management Team."}}

author: Olatunji Olami Cole
review_text:
{"en": "I had such an amazing experience at Radisson Blu  Hotel Ikeja. The environment is incredibly serene quiet, peaceful, and perfect for unwinding.

But what truly stood out for me was the Iyeru Okin Restaurant. Honestly, I had one of the best meals I’ve ever had. The food was exceptional rich, authentic, and full of flavor.

The staff were also top-notch. Very professional, attentive, and warm. From the service to the overall atmosphere, everything felt well put together and intentional.

If you’re looking for great food, quality service, and a calm environment, this place is definitely worth it. I’ll absolutely be coming back."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Olatunji,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review, and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: ALEXANDER WRIGHT
review_text: {"en": "Excellent Service and Great VibesHad a 3-night stay here for business and it was smooth from start to finish. The location is spot on – easy to get to, close to restaurants, and the rooms are quiet despite being central. The highlight for me was the customer service. Babatunde on the evening shift was incredibly helpful. I arrived late and tired, and he handled check-in quickly, explained the amenities clearly, and even stayed back a few minutes to help me sort out a taxi for the next morning. Small things, but they make a huge difference when you’re traveling. Housekeeping was consistent, Wi-Fi was fast, and the staff overall were friendly without being overbearing. If you want a hassle-free stay where the team actually listens, I’d recommend this hotel. Babatunde’s attitude alone is worth coming back for."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Alexander,

Thank you for your wonderful feedback. 

We are delighted to hear that you had a smooth and enjoyable stay and that our location, service, and overall hospitality met your expectations.

We are especially pleased to know that Babatunde made such a positive impression with his helpfulness and professionalism. 

Your kind recognition will certainly be shared with him.

Thank you for your recommendation, and we look forward to welcoming you back to Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja again"}}

author: Peter Oyeyemi
review_text:
{"en": "First time at Radisson Blu Ikj, wow, super cool hotel with gracious Arts on the wall, from the lobby to the rooms.
Note; there are two Radisson but talking about the big One “Blu” the staffs are really professionals, the room I stayed on the 6th floor was a room upstairs kinda vibe…
Would be really nice for a demure party 🥳

Their policy of disallowing videos or pictures where other guests are seated, for privacy reasons is real calm and the way they relate it is polite but nevertheless the less, some really amazing angles allowed for really nice pictures and videos. Such a nice hotel, you should check it out 🥂😮‍💨

POV; I love my job, it takes me to different places, which is why I love google map 🗺️"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Peter,

author: Omotola Abidemi
review_text: {"en": "A really nice and aesthetically pleasing hotel, however I’ve caught food poisoning twice during my numerous stays here. Also, the staff sometimes act like they are doing you a favor."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Omotoyosi,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your stays at Radisson Blu Ikeja.

We truly appreciate your kind comments about the hotel’s aesthetic and overall ambiance. 

However, we are deeply concerned to learn about your experience with suspected food poisoning. 

Please accept our sincere apologies for the distress this must have caused. 

The health and safety of our guests is our highest priority, and this is certainly not reflective of our standards. 

We take such matters extremely seriously and will immediately review this with our culinary and hygiene teams.

We also regret to hear that some service interactions made you feel as though assistance was a favour rather than a standard of hospitality. 

This is not the experience we aim to deliver. 

Genuine warmth and professionalism should always be at the heart of every guest interaction, and your feedback will be addressed with the relevant teams.

We truly value your continued patronage despite these concerns, and we would appreciate the opportunity to connect with you directly to better understand your experience and restore your confidence in us.

Thank you again for your honest feedback. 

We hope to have the opportunity to provide you with the exceptional experience you deserve.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Mohammad Al Abbadi
review_text:
{"en": "Radisson Blu Lagos, Ikeja has a convenient location, especially for travelers with early or late flights, as its proximity to the airport helps avoid Lagos traffic, which is a definite advantage.

However, my overall stay did not fully meet expectations for a hotel in this category. Upon check-in, I had to change my room three times, which made the start of the stay quite inconvenient. The furniture and room finish were average, and the overall feel of the hotel aligns more closely with a 3-star level rather than a premium brand experience.

The service quality was inconsistent, and small details impacted the stay, such as the policy of providing only two complimentary bottles of water per day, with any additional bottles being chargeable. Food quality was also average and did not stand out compared to similar hotels.

In summary, while the location is practical and the hotel is functional, improvements in room readiness, service standards, and overall value would be needed to better match the expectations associated with the brand."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Mohamed,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed and thoughtful feedback. 

We appreciate your kind remarks about our convenient location and proximity to the airport, which we know is especially valuable for travellers navigating Lagos traffic.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during check-in, particularly having to change rooms multiple times. 

This is certainly not the first impression we aim to create, and your comments regarding room readiness, furniture quality, and overall finish have been noted with concern. 

We also regret that the service consistency, food quality, and certain operational details such as the complimentary water policy fell short of your expectations for a premium brand experience.

Your feedback has been shared with our management team and relevant departments, as it highlights important areas where improvements are needed to better align our offerings with brand standards and guest expectations. 

We truly value your honesty, as it helps guide our ongoing efforts to enhance service quality and overall value.

Thank you once again for bringing these matters to our attention. 

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide a more seamless and elevated experience.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Cecilia Gergely
review_text:
{"en": "No matter where in the world I travel, Radisson Blu hotels consistently prove why they are among the best. They never disappoint. The Radisson Blu in Lagos is no exception. The rooms are incredibly spacious, with huge windows and beautiful views, blending modern design with subtle African influences in a way that feels both elegant and tasteful. You can choose between a relaxing bath or a refreshing shower, which is always a lovely touch after a long journey.

But beyond the beautiful rooms and thoughtful design, what truly matters in hospitality are the people — the ones who welcome you and make you feel at home. And once again, Radisson Blu proves that they hire not just professionals, but genuinely kind human beings.

Because of my work, I spend a lot of time traveling and being away from home, and homesickness can quietly creep in. That’s why being treated with warmth and care makes such a difference. From the very first moment the gatekeepers who greet you with a smile no matter the weather or the day you feel something special. Their positivity, despite the demands of their job, is admirable.

The doormen are always helpful with luggage, and at reception, you’re welcomed by true professionals who handle every request with patience and a smile. Housekeeping is equally wonderful. Dumy (I apologize if I misspelled the name) always keeps the room spotless and is incredibly kind. With just a call to reception, someone is always ready to assist with anything you might need.

The breakfast box option is fantastic being able to choose exactly what you want feels thoughtful and personal. If you need laundry service, Temmy is at your door promptly, making sure everything is handled smoothly. At breakfast, Chef Victor prepares omelettes exactly the way you like them perhaps even better than at home. In the evenings, Babatunde greets you warmly and asks about your day, making conversations feel natural and friendly. Oxygen is always ready with recommendations from the buffet, and Stella consistently checks in to ensure everything is perfect. Did I mention how amazing the food is and what a huge variety of choices you always have? And the deserts, oh the sweet deserts, too dangerous if you want to watch your waist line.

However, It’s this warm, welcoming atmosphere that makes all the difference when you’re far from home.

In Romania, we have a saying: “Omul sfințește locul,” which translates to “The person blesses the place.” I truly believe this applies here. The manager, Mr. Alee, clearly understands this philosophy. He has built a team of exceptional people, and whenever I had an issue, he ensured it was resolved promptly and professionally.

I am deeply grateful for the kindness and care I experienced at Radisson Blu Ikeja. If I return to Nigeria, I will definitely ask my company to accommodate me here again. 💙"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Cecilia,

Thank you for such a heartfelt and beautifully written review. 

Reading your words truly means the world to us. 

We are deeply honoured that you chose to stay with us at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja and even more grateful that your experience resonated with you in such a meaningful way.

It is incredibly rewarding to know that you felt the warmth and care of our team throughout your stay. 

Hospitality, at its core, is about people, and your kind recognition of our colleagues from the gatekeepers and doormen to reception, housekeeping, culinary team, and management will be shared with each of them with immense pride, they will be truly touched by your thoughtful mentions.

We are especially moved by your reflection on homesickness and how our team helped create a sense of belonging. 

Creating a home away from home for our guests is exactly what we strive for, and knowing we achieved that for you is the greatest compliment we could receive.

Your beautiful Romanian saying, “Omul sfințește locul” “The person blesses the place,” perfectly captures the spirit of hospitality we believe in. 

Thank you for recognizing the heart and dedication of our team, including Mr. Alee, who will be sincerely grateful for your kind words.

It was an absolute pleasure hosting you, and we truly hope your travels bring you back to Lagos. 

We would be honoured to welcome you again for another memorable stay.

With our warmest gratitude,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Mustapha Boye
review_text: {"en": "This was my first time staying at Radisson Blu, Victoria Island, and I had a great experience. The rooms were clean and comfortable, the atmosphere was calm and luxurious, and the staff were very professional and welcoming. The location in VI is perfect, and the overall service was excellent. I’d definitely recommend it and look forward to visiting again."}

author: Olamide Akinwumi
review_text:
{"en": "I stayed at Radisson Blu Ikeja from January 7–10, 2026 for my wedding and had an extremely distressing experience.

Despite paying a photography fee, staff repeatedly interrupted our photo sessions and inconsistently enforced “off-limits” areas, while other guests were later allowed to take photos in those same locations.

More concerning was a serious breach of privacy on the morning of my wedding, when a staff member entered my suite without consent while I was undressed, demanding payment. This was humiliating and completely unacceptable.

I reported these incidents in person to hotel management at checkout, yet the hotel itself never formally acknowledged what occurred. Later that day, my husband received a call offering us lunch as a resolution, which felt dismissive given the seriousness of the incident.

I also contacted Radisson Hotel Group head office, where a case was opened and the seriousness acknowledged. However, I have received no meaningful resolution, refund, or timeline, only a generic apology. The lack of accountability from Radisson Blu Ikeja has been especially disappointing.

This experience fell far below the standards expected of a luxury hotel, particularly on such an important occasion."}

review_text: {"en": "Radisson was very worth the hype, really. The location is top-tier and the overall ambience? Heavenly!\nOnly let down was the service (food specifically). Other than that, it was a perfect outing and we really enjoyed our time there."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Oluwanifemi,

Thank you for sharing your experience with us. 

We are delighted to hear that Radisson Blu Ikeja lived up to the hype for you, and that you found our location top-tier, the ambience heavenly, and the rooms excellent. 

It is wonderful to know that overall, you had a perfect outing and truly enjoyed your time with us.

We sincerely apologize for the disappointment your wife experienced with the goat meat stew. 

This is certainly not the quality or taste we aim to deliver, and your feedback has been shared with our culinary team for review and improvement. 

We truly appreciate you bringing this to our attention.

Thank you once again for your honest and balanced review.

Omotoyosi Shittu

owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Nicole,

author: Hannah
review_text:
{"en": "I had dinner at Iyeru Okin-The buffet restaurant in this hotel. It was an exceedingly underwhelming experience.

A discourteous front desk representative, a very lean spread consisting of generally bland meals. Even the fruits somehow managed to be tasteless.

The dining area was oppressively hot and the ambiance very dull.  For a buffet deal that cost ₦40,000 per head, I left the restaurant feeling like I did not get my money's worth.

Oh...As soon as I tasted the meals, I realised why the receptionist insisted on receiving payment before the buffet even started-a policy I found utterly ridiculous, by the way.

The management at Iyeru Okin probably fears that the horrid meals and subpar service will cause many incidents of dine and dash."}

The food was delicious with a varierty that almost threw any caution I had out the wind! I really enjoyed anything I ate.
The security was great. No one could come up to our room without presenting their passport.
I totally enjoyed my stay. I definitely will visit again and highly recommend."}

author: Dr. Abimbola Abolarinwa
review_text:
{"en": "We are currently having our annual conference in Ijakadi Hall.
The hall is HOT! The AC does not stay on. It was on only for a few minutes.

We have complained several times to the admin who called engineering and they have not even come to check! It’s one excuse after the other.
This is totally unfair and we are very very unhappy about this, and a very bad experience.
Unfortunately we have 1 more day here.
I wish we could move elsewhere!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Dr. Abimbola,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, and please accept our sincere apologies for the discomfort and inconvenience caused during your conference in the Ijakadi Hall.

We fully understand how frustrating it is to experience high temperatures in the meeting space, especially after raising multiple complaints without prompt resolution. 

This is not the level of service or responsiveness we aim to provide, and we are truly sorry that this has impacted your event and overall experience.

Please be assured that your feedback has been escalated to our Engineering and Management teams for immediate action. 

We are working urgently to restore full air-conditioning in the hall and ensure that your final day with us is significantly improved.

Once again, we deeply regret the inconvenience caused and appreciate your patience. 

Thank you for giving us the opportunity to correct this.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Okoro Vincent Arnold
review_text:
{"en": "I had a really good experience at Radisson Blu Hotel, Ikeja. From the moment I arrived, everything felt well organized and professional. The hotel is well located, secure, and clearly well maintained, which immediately gives peace of mind.
The rooms are spacious, very clean, and comfortable, with attention to detail that makes the stay relaxing. The bed was comfortable, the environment was quiet, and overall it felt like a proper place to rest after a long day.
The staff were courteous, respectful, and always willing to help whenever needed. Their professionalism really stood out and added to the overall experience.
The buffet deserves special mention there was a wide variety of options, everything was well prepared, fresh, and satisfying. Breakfast was enjoyable and well organized, with something for everyone.
Overall, the ambience of the hotel is calm, classy, and welcoming. Whether for business or leisure, this is a solid choice in Ikeja, and I would definitely recommend it."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Vincent,

Thank you for sharing such a thoughtful and detailed review. 

We are delighted to hear that you had a really good experience and that our organization, security, and maintenance gave you immediate peace of mind. 

It is wonderful to know you enjoyed the spacious, clean rooms, comfortable bedding, and the calm, restful environment.

We truly appreciate your kind words about our courteous and professional team, as well as your special mention of the buffet and breakfast variety. 

Your recommendation means a great deal to us, and we are happy to know you consider our hotel a solid choice for both business and leisure in Ikeja.

We look forward to welcoming you back again soon for another relaxing and memorable stay.

 Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Kai Wei Tan
review_text:
{"en": "Please do not stay this hotel, had pay extra 50% for 3 hours laundry end up 7 hours even though had make a phone call asked what is the happening act blur, feedback to reception still arguing, do not apologise.

On the other hand, I was engaged by agent all the expense incur to our agent, end up order soft drink and beer, keep calling for payments, not even bothering to call the agent for verification, I told that my home timing difference from here ahead 7hours, need to sleep, if my agent didn’t pay for it, tomorrow check up I will paying, they ignored me with very rude manners.

In additional, breakfast time the waiter and waitress can’t even bother you about coffee or tea, just hanging around with their colleagues, chitchat each other, may I know this is a standard protocol of 4 star hotel.

I strongly recommend do not ever stay this hotel………"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Kai Wei Tan,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback following your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja. We sincerely regret that your experience did not meet your expectations, and we truly empathize with the frustration you expressed.

Please accept our unreserved apologies for the delay in your laundry service, the miscommunication surrounding the billing procedures, and the lack of attentiveness you encountered during breakfast. These experiences are certainly not reflective of the high standards we are committed to upholding, and we regret any inconvenience this caused you.

We deeply value the trust placed in us by our international guests, and we understand how critical proper communication and courtesy are, especially across different time zones and cultural expectations. Your feedback regarding how the billing for the beverages was handled, as well as the service attitude encountered, is being treated with utmost seriousness.

To help us investigate this matter thoroughly and ensure appropriate follow-up, we kindly request that you forward the details of your stay, such as the name on the reservation, your check-in date, and room number, to info.lagos.ikeja@radissonblu.com, copying training.ikeja@radissonblu.com. This will allow us to review the situation in detail and respond directly with clarity and resolution.

We sincerely hope for the opportunity to regain your trust and welcome you back to deliver the true Radisson Blu experience we are known for.

Best regards,
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: pelumi eniowo
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Eniowo,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience regarding your recent event at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja. We are truly sorry to learn that your expectations were not met and that the experience left you feeling disappointed. Please accept our sincerest apologies for the distress this caused you and your guests.

We would like to clarify that, as a standard operating procedure, our buffet service is prepared to cater to the number of attendees specified and paid for, in this case, 60 guests. In most instances, we extend portions to cover a few additional heads as a gesture of goodwill. However, while the menu may be arranged in a buffet setting, the hotel does not control individual guest portions once service begins, which may, at times, affect the overall distribution.

That said, we take your feedback very seriously and are currently investigating this matter to understand exactly what occurred during your event. The conduct of our team, especially in service-related matters, is expected to reflect courtesy, empathy, and proactive support at all times. We regret if this was not your experience and assure you that the appropriate departments have been notified for immediate review.

To enable us follow up effectively, we kindly request that you share the name under which the reservation was made the 12th June, and your contact details by emailing us at info.lagos.ikeja@radissonblu.com, copying training.ikeja@radissonblu.com.

We truly value your feedback, and while we regret the shortcomings you faced, we hope to have an opportunity to regain your trust in the near future.

Best regards,
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Faith Eromon
review_text: {"en": "I came here for a meeting and did not lodge in the room. Hence, I cannot review the room because I didn't see them. The hotel from the outside looks so beautiful. The meeting hall is nice and cozy. The meals are great and delicious. However, the service is not so nice because during meetings, they will serve tea break but items like spoons serving dishes will be missing and no staff on ground to monitor or assist you. They will have to wait for you to request these things before it will be brought.  The good thing is that once you request it would be brought for you. But the environment is lovely. They have a pool.  Overall it is a great place and I believe the rooms will be equally beautiful and nice for a getaway. I would love to lodge here someday in the future to experience room services."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Faith,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your experience at our hotel, even though you did not stay in our rooms. We truly appreciate your insights and are delighted to hear that you found our hotel to be beautiful and that you enjoyed the meals and meeting facilities.

We sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you encountered during the meeting, especially with the service during tea breaks. Your feedback regarding the missing items and the need for staff monitoring is valuable, and we will address this issue with our team to ensure a smoother and more efficient service in the future.

We are glad to know that you found our restaurant environment lovely and enjoyed the variety and taste of our meals. Our chef will be delighted to hear your compliments, as we strive to provide excellent dining experiences for our guests.

Thank you for your positive comments about our amenities, including the pool, and for expressing your interest in staying with us in the future. We look forward to the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a memorable stay, complete with excellent room service.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: koick Arsane
review_text:
{"en": "I never thought I would experience what I got from Radison blu Lagos
I came for buisness but recieved genuine warmth, kindness and empathy from most staff, in a hotel that upholds standards.  This hotel meets all the standards of a 4 to 5 star hotel , but what you will never find anywhere else is, the honesty of its staff and the marvellous spirit and energy they exude.
Aside being grateful to the management for creating this ambience, I would love to mention some of these wonderful people  starting from the  wonderful lady receptionist that checked me into room 336 on the night I arrived,  22/05, to all the restaurant staff but most importantly  I would love to say thank you to Aliyu Olajide,  and Yusuf Adamu 2 extremely honest and honourable cleaners who  everyday  left my room spotless and never made me worry about losing a pin. Thank you to the  Engineer  Mr Salami who hanled every engineering problem I had and changed the television when it froze.

If you are in Lagos, for buisness, and you are looking for world class comfort,  quality, safety  proximity to airport and honesty, this is the hotel to stay."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your incredible review and for choosing Radisson Blu Lagos Ikeja for your business stay. 

Reading your kind words filled us with pride and joy.

We are truly honored that you experienced not only our standards of comfort, safety, and service, but also the genuine warmth and honesty of our team. Your appreciation of our staff means the world to us especially your kind recognition of the receptionist who checked you in on the night of May 22nd, as well as Aliyu Olajide, Yusuf Adamu, and Engineer Mr. Salami. 

We will be sure to share your comments with them and celebrate their outstanding dedication.

It is uplifting to hear that the spirit and energy of our team made such a lasting impression. 

At Radisson Blu Lagos Ikeja, we believe true hospitality goes beyond service it is about creating meaningful, trustworthy connections. 

Your words confirm that we are on the right path.

Thank you once again for your heartfelt feedback and for recommending us so highly. 

We look forward to welcoming you back soon, whether for business or leisure.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

{"en": "As much as it’s located in a prime spot, I don’t like how it’s too exposed to the main road, its angling is funny.

We're sorry to learn that you found the location's exposure to the main road and the angling to be less favorable, We understand that everyone has different preferences, and we appreciate your perspective.

author: Pelumi Olaleye
review_text: {"en": "First time visiting. Went on a Thursday morning at 1115am. Stopped by to reserve a room for some nights. The outside and inside look great. The lobby area is very inviting and modern. We waited for about 10minutes before we were attended to. Our hostess was rushing us & kept mentioning there is another guest that has been waiting in the seating area much longer than we have been standing in line. It seemed disorganized & like we were being bothersome so we left. I won’t return again but I recommend for first time visitors maybe they will receive better customer service."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Pelumi Olaleye,

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us as we strive to improve with each and every stay.

We sincerely apologize for the discomfort you may have experienced during your visit to book a reservation with us. We equally apologize for the delay and the disorganization exhibited on that day. We understand the importance of having you choose our hotel amongst the many hotels in the country and we acknowledge that we fell short in delivering a complete guest experience. 

Please be assured that we have taken your feedback to heart, and we have notified our service team to rectify and correct the anomaly. We would implement measures to ensure that this does not in any way recur again.

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, and we will ensure that your stay is nothing short of exceptional.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.


Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Mustapha Adeboye
review_text:
{"en": "This is my second time staying at Radisson Blu Hotel, Victoria Island, Lagos, and once again, the experience was absolutely excellent. From the moment I arrived, the atmosphere felt welcoming and calm, which made the stay very comfortable.

The staff were professional, courteous, and always ready to help, just like my first visit. The rooms were clean, spacious, and well-maintained, with a beautiful view and all the necessary amenities for a relaxing stay. Housekeeping did a great job keeping everything neat throughout.

The location is perfect, right in the heart of Victoria Island, making it easy to move around for business or leisure. The food was also impressive, fresh, well prepared, and served in a pleasant environment.

What really stands out for me is the consistency in quality and service. Coming back for a second time and receiving the same high standard shows how committed the hotel is to guest satisfaction.

Overall, Radisson Blu VI continues to exceed expectations, and I would definitely recommend it to anyone looking for comfort, luxury, and great service in Lagos. I look forward to visiting again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Mustapha Adeboye,

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, and we look forward to welcoming you again.

Krys Nwoye

{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Ayeni,

It is heartening to know that you found our reception welcoming, our rooms well-appointed, and the ambiance tranquil and refreshing even amidst the hustle and bustle of the city. 

We are especially pleased that our food and beverage offerings and overall service met your expectations.

While some aspects of the surrounding area may be beyond our immediate control, your observations are valid and helpful, and we will continue to explore ways to enhance the guest experience, both within and beyond the hotel.

We hope to welcome you back soon for another memorable stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Rashidat Aweda
review_text:
{"en": "Here's a lovely review for a hotel:

*5/5 Stars - Exceptional Experience!*

"I recently had the pleasure of staying at (Radisson blu) and it exceeded all my expectations! The moment I stepped in, I felt welcomed by the warm and elegant ambiance. The staff were incredibly friendly, attentive, and went above and beyond to ensure my comfort.

The room was immaculate, spacious, and tastefully decorated with stunning views of the [city/landscape]. The bed was heavenly, and I slept soundly every night.

The amenities were top-notch, including the fitness center, pool, and restaurant. The food was delicious, with a great selection of local and international cuisine.

What truly made my stay special was the exceptional service. From the concierge to the housekeeping team, everyone was dedicated to making my stay unforgettable.

Thank you, ( Radisson blu)for an unforgettable experience! I highly recommend this gem to anyone seeking a luxurious and memorable"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Rashidat,

Thank you so much for your glowing review and for choosing Radisson Blu.

We're thrilled to hear that your stay with us exceeded your expectations and that every aspect from the warm ambiance to the attentive service made your visit special.

It’s wonderful to know that you enjoyed the immaculate and comfortable room, stunning views, and our variety of amenities, including the fitness center, pool, and restaurant.
 
Your kind words about our team mean the world to us, and we’ll be sure to share your feedback with them.

We look forward to welcoming you back soon for another luxurious and memorable experience. Thank you for recommending us.

Best regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and staff."}}

author: Tuoyo-E
review_text: {"en": "Rooms are very nice, food is good. Lobby area looks quite nice. Service is not the best though. We went there for a conference which started before check in time. Not the hotel for you if you are keen on swimming."}

review_text: {"en": "This is my third visit to this wonderful edifice and the services rendered are top notch when compared to other similar facilities. owner_responses:

We appreciate your honest feedback and thank you for sharing them with us.
We are delighted, that our service team impressed you with their first-class service delivery skills and their responsiveness and respectful attitude. Our service teams are professionals trained to deliver the highest standard of service to our guests and we are delighted at your commendation.
Guest feedback is imperative for us to ensure that we are meeting and exceeding our guests’ expectations. Your comments are therefore much appreciated, and we hope to welcome you to Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja again soon.

Kind Regards
Omotoyosi Shittu."}}

author: Sola Akinrinade
review_text: {"en": "A five-star hotel in the heart of the capital of Lagos State of Nigeria. The quality of the facilities is generally first rate, just as the services are excellent. As I was visiting and only had minimal contact, I was impressed with what I experienced. Staff generally represented the hotel very well. The food was tantalizing; unfortunately, I lacked the necessary appetite to savour the delicacies. Given the hotel rating, it is not exactly a surprise that the hotel and it's services do not particularly come cheap. But it is an experience worth having."}

author: Patricia Iroegbu
review_text:
{"en": "Come on!!
I met up with hubby here, and from the moment my cab stopped at the entrance, it  was 5* treatment
Friendly staff, luxurious ambience, the room was divine with a lovely view of Lagos metropolis. I ordered afang soup and eba with goat meat, and my goodness was it yummy( I was too hungry and enjoying the meal too much to remember to take a picture). The breakfast buffet was one of my best experiences. A wide and diverse variety of meals, drinks, and fruits, and everything was super tasty.
The bathroom and amenities were superb.  I truly enjoyed my stay and plan to visit again soon."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Patrisha,

Thank you so much for taking the time to share your wonderful experience with us! We're delighted to hear that you and your husband enjoyed a memorable stay at our hotel.

It's fantastic to know that you felt welcomed from the moment you arrived and that you found our staff friendly and accommodating. We take great pride in providing a luxurious ambiance and ensuring our guests feel pampered throughout their stay.

We're thrilled that you enjoyed the delicious Afang soup and Eba with goat meat! Our culinary team works hard to deliver mouthwatering dishes, and we're delighted to hear that it hit the spot for you. 
As for the breakfast buffet, we're thrilled to hear that it exceeded your expectations. We strive to offer a diverse selection of meals, drinks, and fruits to cater to all tastes.

It's wonderful to know that you appreciated the superb bathroom and amenities provided in your room. Ensuring our guests' comfort and satisfaction is our top priority, and we're pleased to hear that we succeeded in this aspect.

Thank you once again for choosing to stay with us, and we can't wait to welcome you back for another exceptional experience soon!

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu"}}

review_text: {"en": "The location is so close to both the local and international airport. It's also central for other business and social events. The ambience is beautiful, the food is amazing. author: Barbara Onianwah
review_text:
{"en": "I love coming here for an offsite work day or for a meeting.

It's accommodating, quiet and unobtrusive whether you are an in-house guest or walk-in.

The service is very good and the staff are professional and polite.

I've attended events, workshops and had office retreats here and the service is consistent.

I've hosted my colleagues at the restaurant for afternoon buffet and being at the downstairs bar and lounge as well, I've never had to complain about the service.

Looking forward to being an in-house guest sometime."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Barbara,

We appreciate your rating and comment.
We can't wait to have you stay at the Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja. You will be amazed by our beautiful and spacious room, and also understand why we are number one hotel in Ikeja.
We value your business loyalty, and we expect you again.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Nkem Nwoko
review_text: {"en": "This place is awesome, I love the fact that the interior is so lovely, filled with art and so much creativity. The environment is so peaceful, quiet and yet captivating.\nThis is a place for you can bring your children to, a good relaxation spot also a place for lovebirds, business and family.\nHonestly I have been to a lot of hotels but this is a 5 star hotel with a difference, the experience is unique that you never want to leave. author: Amina Yahaya
review_text: {"en": "A definition of pure luxury from the spacious, beautifully decorated rooms to the sleek and beautiful bathroom; everything here screams comfort and luxury. The restaurant buffet is delicious although I think the options are a bit repetitive. The poolside is a delight especially at night with the blue waters. Located in a good spot with shopping malls and restaurants in the environ. The staff are very professional and always ready to help. My two weeks of stay here was completely satisfying. I love how they also made special provisions for us Muslims who were fasting and required earlier breakfast."}

author: Dr.Princess Olufemi-Kayode
review_text: {"en": "I attended the 3rd day  event of a conference organized by the Nigeria Films and Censors Board and supported by Netflix. author: Michelle Serrano
review_text: {"en": "Close enough to the Airport. Breakfast buffet very tasty and with tons of variety.Down Side: The room was too dirty to ignore, mirrors had stains from last guest, the large window for the view was dirty inside and out,sadly and unbelievably the rooms had no towels. For such a large brand, i was embarrassed.Nevertheless front desk was very nice in the morning hence 2 stars"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Michelle Serrano,

Thank you for sharing your feedback with us. We truly appreciate your insights as they help us improve our services.

We are pleased to hear that you found our location close to the airport convenient and that you enjoyed our breakfast buffet with its tasty and varied options.

However, we are deeply disappointed to learn about the cleanliness issues you encountered in your room, including stains on mirrors, dirty windows, and the absence of towels. Please accept our sincere apologies for the inconvenience you faced during your stay. These issues do not meet the high standards we aim to uphold at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, and we will take immediate action to address them to ensure that such oversights do not happen again.

We appreciate your kind words about our front desk staff in the morning, and we will pass along your compliments to them.

Once again, we apologize for the shortcomings you experienced, and we hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a more satisfying stay in the future.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards,
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

review_text: {"en": "My first stay in Nigeria was a nice one at this hotel. The members of staff were very friendly and was willing to help. We didn’t lodge but we were allowed to chill at the pool area after our lunch.

It was a wonderful experience and you’ll definitely enjoy your stay. Worth the money paid.

Also, as a picture freak, lot of wonderful and beautiful places to take pictures. Love art works and designs. I love love 😊😊

I would like to spend a weekend here when I can.

I hope you enjoy your stay 😘"}

Radisson Blu had he perfect environment,  with ambience, no outside distraction and of course comfort and needed for us to concentrate as well as gain from the programme. Their refreshment menu (buffet) was also worth it. I recommend for conferences, meetings and the like."}

author: Ayowande Ayo
review_text:
{"en": "Iyeru Okin restaurant is on the first floor of Radisson Blu hotel, GRA, Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria.

I visited for Sunday buffet with family on 09/02/2025.

Location is easy to find. The welcome was warm and the staff are attentive.

The variety of food is good, everyone will find something to eat. The food is very tasty and you can eat all you want.

Drinks are limited to a glass or a bottle of soft drinks plus water.

One of the waiters, Timothy served really well, he seems happy with his job.

Space is a bit small, particularly if you visit on a Sunday.

We enjoyed our meal. We hope to visit again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Ayowande,

Thank you for visiting Iyeru Okin at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, and for taking the time to share your experience. 

We are delighted that you enjoyed the Sunday buffet with your family and that our attentive staff, delicious food, and warm hospitality made your visit special.

We appreciate your kind words about Timothy we will be sure to recognize his excellent service. 

We also take note of your feedback regarding space on Sundays and will continue working to enhance guest comfort.

We look forward to welcoming you back for another wonderful dining experience soon.

Best regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Delphine Alexandré
review_text: {"en": "Without doubt one of the best hotels I've stayed during my time on Lagos Mainland. The staff was courteous and professional, the food was amazing (I'm a big foodie and a professional chef) which added to the experience. The hotel was close to the airport which was a big plus for me as I'm a frequent flyer. My room was massive with attractive lighting systems and a great view.\n\nHowever, I requested for two wine glasses, it took them over 4hours to bring it up (that was after I had to go down and request for it again, I ended up using teacups for the wine I ordered). I requested for the housekeeping to clean up my room and change the sheets (I had paid for late checkout - half a day), they never came. Upon checking out, I called reception and kindly requested for the porter to assist in bringing my suitcases down, 30mins went by no one showed up. Again, I had to go down and iterate my request while obviously frustrated as I had a flight to catch. I truly enjoyed my stay for 8 nights until the last day when all these occurred. Please work on your room service."}

author: This Nthat
review_text: {"en": "I went to Radisson Blu on the 1st of January 2024 to have dinner, and what I saw there is a brewing health hazard. The buffet table was unattended, and you could see food droppings on the ladle handles, with people just grabbing food and making direct contact with it. The taste of the food ruined our night; it was horrible with no panache. The desserts were laughable; who bakes gelatin and cheesecake together, and so hard too? The flan dessert was not jiggly and very gritty. The Jollof was abysmal. The bathroom was stained and dirty. The waiters were subpar, and to be honest, I tried to find something good in it all, but alas, we all couldn't wait to leave the restaurant. The lights were too bright, and the dinner rolls were so hard. Honestly, the worst dinner of my life."}

review_text: {"en": "Went for the Lunch buffet. It exceeded my expectations.  The ambiance is welcomh very cozy and private.. author: Ojerime Ikpikpini
review_text: {"en": "Great ambience. Cool place to sit out with family and friends or alone especially by the lagoon. There are shops to purchase clothes and accessories. review_text: {"en": "This restaurant is situated inside the hotel itself, so it’s not easy locating it. The restaurant is spacious and suitable for a mini gathering. owner_responses:

author: Anita Nnamaka
review_text: {"en": "I enjoyed every bit of my stay from the front desk personnel beautiful smile to the luxury amenities, food, quiet and safe with high quality technology. This is the definition of home away from home"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Anita,

We trust this message finds you well. We are truly touched by your delightful feedback, and we extend our heartfelt appreciation for taking the time to share your experience at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Your kind words describing your stay as enjoyable, from the warm welcome at the front desk to the luxury amenities, high-quality technology, and the overall ambiance, bring immense joy to our team. Creating a "home away from home" atmosphere is precisely what we aim for, and we are thrilled to know that we succeeded in making your stay memorable and comfortable.

We take great pride in providing our guests with a safe, quiet, and luxurious environment, coupled with modern amenities to enhance their overall experience. Your appreciation serves as a testament to our commitment to delivering exceptional hospitality.

Thank you once again for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. We look forward to the pleasure of hosting you again, ensuring that each visit continues to be a delightful and memorable experience. If there are specific aspects you enjoyed or any preferences you have for your next stay, please feel free to let us know.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Abayomi Michael
review_text: {"en": "Looking out for a nice serene five star hotel within,with innovative services, Radisson Blu Ikeja stands out with the diverse cuisine,beautiful ambiance points.The historical art and gallery spot with indoor pool table and bar, stand by excellent service from experienced waiters really makes it a complete place for relaxation,business meetings,get together for family and friends. A wonderful experience I had so to say."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Michael,

We trust this message finds you well, and we sincerely appreciate your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. Your detailed feedback is truly heartening, and we are delighted to hear about your wonderful experience.

We are thrilled that Radisson Blu Ikeja stands out for you as a nice, serene five-star hotel. Providing innovative services, diverse cuisine, and a beautiful ambiance are all integral to our commitment to delivering exceptional experiences for our guests.

Your mention of the historical art and gallery spot, the indoor pool table and bar, as well as the excellent service from experienced waiters warms our hearts. It's gratifying to know that our efforts to create a complete space for relaxation, business meetings, and get-togethers for family and friends have been appreciated.

If there's anything specific you would like to share or if there's anything we can do to make your future stays even more enjoyable, please feel free to let us know.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Best regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: nnene nnoli
review_text: {"en": "Great and beautiful hotel. Meal was superb and catered properly for my low cab needs. The Christmas decoration was AWESOME, never seen one like that before. Spouse n kids had a great time. All i spent was worth it."}

Omotoyosi Shittu

I remain martaservices massage therapist....

author: Patience Toyin-Thomas
review_text: {"en": "Updates:\nShortly  after this review was posted,  we were contacted by the GM of the hotel who apologized to us for the treatment we received. He also ensured we got our refund the next day. We received a formal apology *email and we were assured that the reservation manager would face a formal disciplinary  panel to investigate her unprofessional conduct and the fraudulent activities associated with making reservations and getting refunds. (I read other reviews,  it appears that getting a refund has been a problem for others as well). We were also offered a complimentary stay for one night to make up for the inconveniences we were subjected to during our stay. We are satisfied with the resolution of this issue."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Many thanks Ms. Patience Ugwi.

We are glad that you and your husband were satisfied with the resolution.
Rest assured that we are constantly evolving to make sure we meet and exceed your expectations.
We look forward to seeing you again to show you true hospitality.

Jeffrey Jikiemi.

Dear Ms. Patience Ugwi,

Thank you for your candid feedback.
We wish to assure you that your feedback about your service experience at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja is viewed in serious light.
Please accept our sincere apologies for the negative experience.
The management would ensure that your refund is fast tracked with Unified Payment.
Your experience of the service delivery most certainly does not reflect the high standard that Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja is usually proud to offer.
We confirm therefore that your concerns have been addressed, and that corrective action is being taken to rectify the shortcomings.
Once again, we do empathize with you on this encounter, and do tender our apologies with all sincerity.
We look forward to welcoming you again, so we can make things right.

Warmest Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

This is highly not acceptable.... Wake up this morning to see lot of messages from my visitor requesting for a change of hotel because they are not comfortable."}

author: Guilherme Marquez
review_text: {"en": "I stayed here for the first time  and I had a very not satisfied experience. Went to the restaurant and have dinner. Wrote my number to be charged but the manager said i had to pay. That i didnt make any garantee at the front desk ( i paid in advance) .\nI am a foreigner and this situation really pices me of and makes my thoughts about choosing a hotel. A Hotel like this one treating a client like this means the need of having new values to keep growing."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Guiherme

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us as we strive to improve with each and every stay.

We sincerely apologize for the unprofessional conduct of our team. We understand the importance of having you choose our hotel amongst the many hotels in the country and we acknowledge that we fell short in delivering a complete guest experience.

Please be assured that we have taken your feedback to heart, and we are working diligently to rectify this issue. We have implemented measures to ensure that this does not in any way recur again.

Thank you for bringing this to our attention, as it allows us to improve our services and provide a better experience for our valued guests. 

Please, send your contact details to us at training.ikeja@radissonblu.com so that one of our management team would reach out to you to formally tender our sincere apologies.

While we await your details, we apologise once again. 

We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, and we will ensure that your stay is nothing short of exceptional.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.


Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}
