author: Fkbp Visa
review_text:
{"en": "Staff is friendly and helpfull. Location is nice. Security on a good level.
That's all...
Room service everytime missing all requests.
Delivery food - more than 2 hours. But it doesn't mean that you'll get your order. The record - dinner was delivered in 4 hours.
To get any service you need to call on reception every 20-30 minutes just for remind them that you are stiil here, that you are still get nothing.
I don't understand how is it work..."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Hello Fkbp Visa,

Thank you for taking the time to give your valuable feedback.
Reading through your review, we realized that we did not deliver the excellent service that you deserved during your stay with us. We sincerely apologize for this and can assure you that we have communicated your feedback to our Executive Chef and Director of Food and Beverage to investigate and resolve all the lapses so that this will not occur again.
This was not the service that we strive to give and we hope that you will visit again, so that we can make things right.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
PA to GM"}}

author: S. Nicogravity
review_text: {"en": "It wasn't bad, although the transition has its issues but it was overall okay , the lightening wss good, the reception wss lively and a good team to help"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear  S. Nicogravity,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review, and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu"}}

author: Gbenga Adegboye
review_text: {"en": "Very nice place to relax, the ambience is absolutely beautiful. Jane at the restaurant did a good job ensuring we were well attended to and got all we needed."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Gbenga,

Thank you for your wonderful review! We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel to be a very nice place to relax and enjoy the beautiful ambiance.

We are especially pleased to hear that Jane at the restaurant took excellent care of you and ensured all your needs were met. 

We will be sure to pass along your kind words to her.

Your feedback is greatly appreciated, and we look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing stay.

Best regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the management and team."}}

author: Boluwatiwi Ayo-Opaleke
review_text:
{"en": "Radisson offers a truly aesthetic 5-star experience. The ambience is beautiful with simple, breath-taking decor, state-of-the-art facilities and tasteful music.

For those looking to have a decent meal with family and loved ones, the all-you-can-eat buffet services is great for dates, birthdays, and other themed events that would have few people (average 20/25 people) in attendance.

Bigger gatherings may require proper booking to enjoy a wider variety of services.

Their staff are cordial and professional.

Their underground parking arrangement is just about adequate, but may be too small during peak periods.

I am yet to experience the accomodation services."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Boluwatiwi,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Abigail Okara
review_text: {"en": "This hotel, although 4 star but has a 5 star rating. It's an easy access from there to the airport and it's a luxurious structure with their rooms/suits ranging from N66,092.00 and above. Their security system is high tech and modern, the pool is also magnificent and the meals are continental/intercontinental. They also have an underground parking lot."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Hello Pherre,

We truly appreciate your patronage, review and rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: Chilaski Obasi
review_text: {"en": "Radisson Blu should be given a 5 star rating...\nNice apartments with cutting edge interior designs, conducive environment, state of the arts event/conference center. Their staffs... well mannered, would treat you like a king/queen. Enjoyed my stay there. 👍 …"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Chilaski,

We appreciate your feedback.
Kindly review your rating to complement your comment.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Adeyemo Esther
review_text: {"en": "Myself and my course mates actually went on a tour to the establishment on this day, we were beautifully welcomed, each and every staff we came across were so accommodating, talk more of the tour guide, he is very accommodating and competent, he answers all questions perfectly well, they never underrated anyone, we all enjoyed our tour."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Adeyemo,

We would like to express our sincere appreciation for your kind words regarding your recent tour of Radisson Blu Hotel. It brings us immense joy to learn that you and your course mates had a wonderful experience during your visit.

Our team takes great pride in providing a warm and accommodating environment for all our guests. It's delightful to hear that each staff member, including our tour guide, contributed to making your visit enjoyable. We strive to ensure that every guest feels valued, and your positive feedback is a testament to our commitment.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel for your tour, and we appreciate your kind recommendation.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Donald Foy
review_text: {"en": "Convenient location for the international and local airports, a beautiful hotel. Very spacious open plan layout in the lounge with access to great restaurants and bar area. Nicely decorated which gives it a great atmosphere."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Donald,

We appreciate your feedback.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja; we look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Ifechi Ezeanowi
review_text: {"en": "I stayed in a beautiful and comfortable room. The food was awesome. WiFi was steady. The service given to every guest is befitting for a king, lol. I thoroughly enjoyed my stay."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ifechi,

We appreciate your honest feedback and thank you for sharing them with us.

We are delighted that our service team impressed you with their first-class service delivery skills, responsiveness, and respectful attitude. 

Our service teams are professionals trained to deliver the highest standard of service to our guests and we are delighted at your commendation.

We would extend these commendations to them and the entire staff of Radisson Hotel Blu Ikeja as We look forward to welcoming you soon at the Hotel.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.
Kindest regards
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the Management and team."}}

author: Tijesunimi Olupekan
review_text: {"en": "I love the indoor setting, I think it’s magnificent. However, I think there is room for improvement in the outdoor area in making it more beautiful even if I can tell there is already effort being made with the Water Fountain at the entrance of the hotel."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Oluseyi,

Thank You for your review and rating, your observations are well noted.
Do stop by again soon.

Regards
C.A"}}

author: Bilikis Orehin
review_text: {"en": "My visit to Radisson Blu Hotel was Educational Tour where we met Mr Chris who was so welcoming, and and very Hospitable. ,we visited other Department where we saw how hospitality is being done .  RADISSON BLU is a very good place to lodge . Thank you for having us"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Bilikis,

Thank you for taking the time to share your experience at Radisson Blu. 

We are delighted that your educational tour was insightful and that Mr. Krys made you feel welcome.

Providing exceptional hospitality is at the heart of what we do, and we are glad you had the opportunity to explore our departments and witness our commitment to excellent service.

We truly appreciate your kind words and hope to welcome you back again for another tour or a stay with us. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Best regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the management and team."}}

author: Don Joki
review_text: {"en": "Good hotel located in ikeja GRA. Check-in was quick and efficiently done. The room was quite spacious and came well equipped. There was a safe for valuables, mini fridge, coffee maker and complimentary water. Only thing lacking was pressing iron. The bathroom was also well equipped with a number of towels (no robe nor slippers), toiletries (no weighing scale). There was a bathtub and separate shower. The restaurant was good and I savoured their breakfast,lunch, and dinner buffet which were well represented both locally and continentally. There is a spa, swimming pool and bar in the hotel. The hotel has basement parking and adequate security. Will definitely visit again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Don,

Thank you for your review and rating. We are glad that you enjoyed every bit of your stay with us.

We appreciate every of your review as it pleases us to know that we were able to exceed your expectations.

Thank you for commending our security protocol  for their excellent customer service .

We look forward to welcoming you again.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: ife ilesanmi
review_text: {"en": "Very lovely setting from the reception, to the meeting halls where you can have all sorts of meetings and events from large to smaller crowds. Rooms are well equipped and very neat, the restaurant offers a buffet service with various types of meals."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ife,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: SAMCHIEZ STUDIO
review_text: {"en": "Very beautiful and hospitable place to be . I really loved the vibes the whole environment was given, the meal we're a scare of 1/10 8.5. thank for the service I wish to be their again next year."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear SAMCHIEZ STUDIO,

We trust this message finds you well, and we sincerely appreciate your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. Your feedback is truly appreciated, and we are delighted to hear about your positive experience.

We are thrilled that you found our hotel to be a very beautiful and hospitable place. Creating a welcoming environment is our goal, and it's heartening to know that you enjoyed the vibes throughout the property.

Thank you for rating the meals with a score of 8.5 out of 10. We appreciate your feedback on the dining experience, and we will continue to strive for excellence in providing delicious and satisfying meals for our guests.

We look forward to welcoming you again next year. If there's anything specific you would like to share or if there's anything we can do to make your future stays even more enjoyable, please feel free to let us know.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Best regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Dolapo Bello
review_text: {"en": "Great customer service.  I did not have a nice experience as the hotel was flooded and had water leaking from  the roof. However management promptly resolved the issue with drying equipment and towels.. Great, but I won't pay that much for stress."}

author: K S
review_text: {"en": "I didn't feel a warm welcome - it wasn't surprising when more than one other colleague expressed same sentiment several days after.\nIt was also deeply upsetting when a knock on the door at about 1245am resulted in a nametag-less fellow claiming he was delivering a teacup as requested (by who!?).\nBeyond these, I maintained 4 stars because there's no 3.5, the hotel's in a serene Ikeja location (no great views though), the ambience is above-average, the facility seemed overall well maintained, and YES - the Cut restaurant serves great steak!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Ks,

We appreciate your review and rating. 

Thank you for sharing your experience with us and for presenting your complaint.

 We assure you that we take our guest feedback very seriously.

We apologize for the inconvenience and discomfort you may have experienced in our Hotel during your stay with us especially with the unordered tea delivered to your room at about 12.45am we would therefore investigate this complaint further.

We assure you that these lapses are not part of our process, and we are definitely doing all we can to correct these flaws so that our esteemed guests do not encounter such situations again.

We would therefore be escalating your observation and feedback to our management team to prevent a repeat of these occurrences.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.


Kindest regards
Shittu Omotoyosi
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Chukwu Onuoha
review_text: {"en": "One of the best hotels in Lagos and Nigeria. Environment is very beautiful and ambience is magical. Services are on point. Food is awesome and rooms are of international standards. Very much recommendable for all classes especially those with high taste. Their prices are a little higher than the normal but the value will far exceed every Kobo spent."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Chukwu,,

You Wowed! us with your wonderful review of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Best Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: ToluwaNimi B
review_text: {"en": "Thoroughly enjoyed my stay here. The staff were quite friendly and courteous.  They have a lovely buffet at the restaurant and decent spa service. I'll recommend this hotel to anyone looking for great service with contemporary amenities."}
owner_responses: {"en": {"text": "it is an absolute booster to read your comment and your appreciation of the services you received. Be with us again. Many thanks"}}

author: obiesie chidozie kenneth
review_text: {"en": "I have been using radison blu ikeja for the past 8yrs and it’s one of the best hotels I have used. Customer service is top notch and the delivery of their service is Carrie dour excellently.\nA highly recommended hotel to visit and relax"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Obiesie,

Thank you for your incredible loyalty over the past 8 years.

We are truly honored to be your hotel of choice and delighted to know that our service has consistently met your expectations.

Your kind words about our customer service and overall experience mean so much to us. 

It’s always a pleasure to welcome you, and we appreciate your recommendation. 

We look forward to continuing to provide you with excellent stays for many more years to come!

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Rashidat Lawal Abiola
review_text: {"en": "Loved the buffet at Iyeru Okin restaurant met a woman that knew and lived her job Mariam and her crew had a lovely attentive smile at all times. I know this as no one waited for me to ask for anything I needed at brunch yesterday.  They were there with a smile and answers before I asked. I saw a qibla direction pointer in my room too. Awesome never seen one any hotel before. Thoughtful."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Rashidat,
We appreciate your review and rating. We understand from your review that you enjoyed your stay with us.
Thank you for commending our service team and our process. We are glad we were able to impress and wow you.
While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Obiageli A Bertrand
review_text: {"en": "The only issue here is the Parking lots, gets filled easily. I think there's need to buy up more space. I can't say much with the rooms, but going by the lnterior and neatness, I believe it will be okay."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Augusta,

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us as we strive to improve with each and every stay.

Please be assured that we have taken your feedback to heart, and we are doing all we can to ensure this is resolved permanently in the nearest future. Please, kindly bear with us. 

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.


Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Kelvin Aikaro
review_text: {"en": "Nice place but over rated and over priced. Rowdy hallways and elevator.\nI wish/recommend they create a private entrance for people who are lodged there away from people who are attending events there.\nThere is no much privacy here, there is a high probability you bump into people you know because the whole hotel/facilities is open to public regardless whether you are lodged there or not."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Kelvin,

We apologise for the inconvenience you experienced while you were staying with us.
Your comment has been communicated to the management for corrective purpose.
We look forward to welcoming you again.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Kufre Udoudo
review_text: {"en": "A nice and cozy place. Nice foods, good services, and friendly staff."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Kufre,

Thank you so much for your rating! We truly appreciate your feedback and are delighted to know that you enjoyed your stay.

We look forward to welcoming you back to the hotel soon for another wonderful experience.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Rachel
review_text: {"en": "I really had a wonderful time. Mariam at the front desk was really so kind and welcoming , loved her."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Rachel,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja. We are delighted to hear that you had a wonderful holiday experience with your friends.

It is especially pleasing to know that Mariam at the front desk made such a positive impression with her kindness and welcoming demeanor. We will be sure to recognize her for her outstanding service. We are equally glad that you appreciated our great view and child-friendly environment — features we are proud to offer our guests.

We look forward to welcoming you again for another memorable stay.

Best regards,
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Bello Funsho Oluwaseyi
review_text: {"en": "A very good hotel! Located in the ever busy Ikeja GRA.. They provide top notch hospitality and great customer service. Provision for the physically disabled, medium sized event hall, with good restrooms. Lack of service/vendors elevator is a big disadvantage."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Oluwaseyi,
Compliment of the season.
Thank you for your review and rating.
Your commendation of our service delivery and facility are highly valued. 
We have noted your areas of improvement. There are two Elevators which serves all of our Vendors. However,  one is currently undergoing maintenance and out of use. We assure you that we are doing our best to have it fixed.
While we look forward to your visit again, please do enjoy the rest of the season. 

Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: George Peart
review_text: {"en": "Great hotel, the food varied very well. For a double occupancy, they provide only one set of towels but deliver the second set when asked.  However, they were not properly prepared to send visitors on excursions to interesting places in the city of Lagos. The could make it easier by having brochures describing sites to be seen."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear George Peart,

We appreciate your patronage, review and rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We sincerely apologise for our inability to provide brochures of interesting sites.
We assure you that this issue has been escalated to the management and action has been taken to rectify our short coming.
Kindly request for a 'Guest Guide' at the Front Desk when next you visit us.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
PA to GM."}}

author: Phantino (Phantino)
review_text: {"en": "The hotel is everything called 5 star, the services down to the workers everything is on point. The restaurant is also very neat, organized and the food is very good. The only problem i had was that it took a while for house keeping to come through after requesting and then their car park is quite small."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Uba,

Thank you for your words of appreciation shared with us during your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

We sincerely apologise for the negative experience you had with the housekeeping.

Please visit us again soon.

Regards,

Jeffrey"}}

author: Oreoluwa Sorunmu
review_text: {"en": "I had a great time in the 4 days I spent. They're covid compliant, their breakfast is the best I've had so far, the Ambience is generally great.\n\nI'd definitely love to go back sometime"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Oreoluwa,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Ayoyemi A
review_text: {"en": "Just like home (I reside in Northern California). Very friendly and helpful staff. I stayed there for 10days. Rooms were clean, neat and tidy, food was slightly over priced in comparison to surrounding areas but you’re paying for the comfort of it being brought to your room. The response to my needs were quick. Night time was quiet with no disturbances. A great escape and vacation from America. Christmas at Radisson Blu was lovely!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "WOW!
We are thrilled by your great comment and perfect rating, Astarjsta.
Your review encourages us to do more.
We look forward to welcoming you again whenever travel brings you back to Lagos in the near future.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Lagos Ikeja.

Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Segun Bakare
review_text: {"en": "It's indeed a 5-Start hotel. Security is great and services are top notch. It also has in-house business such as a spa, coffee shop, boutique, etc. There are also event centres in the building with great aesthetics and AC.\nThe environment is also very conducive and quite, of course, it's located in the GRA. They also provide free wifi for their guest.\nMy advice, if you want to book, go directly to their website and it is cheaper."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Bakare,,
We appreciate your patronage, review and rating..
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Kind regards,

SGN
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Ola Olah
review_text: {"en": "The room was worth it neat and classy just the way I liked it , went therefore a weekend getaway from all the lagos bubble and hustle, there is a complementary breakfast lunch if you meet the timing , I missed mine so I had to get food downstairs but it's an experience overall"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear 2Olas,

Thank you for your review and rating.
We are delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Thank you for commending our service teams and our services. We are glad that you were impressed with our services.
We assure you that our service team are professionally trained to deliver the highest service standards to our esteemed guests.
We are glad we made you feel welcome here.
Please, do visit us again so that we can extend this top-notch service to you and /or your family again.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Olawale Olapegba
review_text: {"en": "Beautifully furnished hotel, elegant architecture and pleasant scenery in the middle of the metropolitan Lagos mainland. Apart from the niceties, I noticed something unique: the staff were very friendly and willing to help. At different points, different cadre of happy staff helped me with phone photos."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Olawale,

We are glad to receive a perfect rating from you.

You have encouraged us to do more and we look forward to welcoming you again to Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Kind Regards,
Esther U."}}

author: Adegboyega Akintade
review_text: {"en": "I was not happy that a staff directed to the wrong place which is another hotel as they do not even know the event they are hosting"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Akintade,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback.

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience you experienced due to the misdirection by one of our team members. 

This does not reflect the high standard of service we aim to provide, and we understand how frustrating it must have been, especially when attending an important event.

Please rest assured that your comments have been shared with the relevant team to ensure better internal communication and event awareness going forward.

We truly value your patronage and hope to welcome you back soon for a much-improved experience.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Mjay
review_text:
{"en": "Came here for a one day retreat with my company and I was pleased with the service delivery from security to restaurant staff.

The meeting rooms are very spacious and have the necessary amenities and you can also request WiFi. Facilities are accessible with lounges available for breakout sessions and such.

Lunch was divine and the selection was sufficient but can be a bit chaotic with large groups. I’d probably suggest having an attendant on hand.

Also has accessible routes I.e. wheelchair access."}
owner_responses: {"en": {"text": "Dear Mojisola, we are so thankful for taking the time to write about you experience at our hotel. We thank you for your comments. regards\nGeorge"}}

author: Tina Eze
review_text:
{"en": "My experience at Radisson Blu was top-notch.
The atmosphere is welcoming. It's modern and classy with the best ambiance I've seen so far.

The staff? Helpful and polite. I was there for a conference and I enjoyed every bit of the event which I owe to the serenity of the environment.

I didn't have an opportunity to enter the rooms but I'm sure it would beat your expectations.
Good planning and amazing finishing.
Bravo!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Tina,

Thank you for the great review, kind words and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
Your feedback is valuable to us and will definitely be shared with the team to continue to inspire and motivate them to deliver exceptional guest service.
We are delighted to see that you had a pleasant time with us and we hope to serve you again in the near future.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Mirabelle Morah
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "You "WOWed" us, Mirabelle!

The team here are so thrilled by your feedback and it really made our day here at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

We apologise for the complimentary breakfast disappointment you encountered during your stay with us.

However, for your future bookings, please visit Radisson Blu brand website or book directly through the hotel email address. (reservations.ikeja@radissonblu.com), you can be rest assured to get whatever you are entitled to without any disappointment than booking through a third party platform.

We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey
PA to GM"}}

author: Julian Bassey
review_text: {"en": "Nice and cozy. Didn't get to see much of the main hotel only one of the event halls. That was nice. The food was not bad. The decor, the ambiance also good. Would need to go back and experience more, like restaurants, bars, rooms maybe. So far so good."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Julian,

Thanks for the feedback and rating.

Join us during the World Cup to watch our live showing of the matches. We will have some nice packages available.

Thanks
A.M"}}

author: Mandeep Walia
review_text: {"en": "Beautiful hotel with amazing staff. Rooms were clean and tidy in this situation. Nice pool and gym. Drinking area around the pool with view. Big buffet option. Good room service. And big bathrooms with tub and shower both."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mandeep,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: Omenkukwu Chinedu
review_text: {"en": "Beautiful hotel in the heart of Ikeja, Lagos. Maintains the Radisson standard or luxury, class and comfort. The facility has good underground parking, friendly staff and clean environment. The food is also good. I didn't get the chance to visit a lodge room/apartment but I can imagine it will be equally good. Well deserved 5 stars"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Hello Chinedu,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Adeyinka Adebanjo
review_text: {"en": "What a great experience and very professional service from a great team.  Just want to say a big thank you to JAMIU, the house keeper.  He went all the way to make my room a home"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Adeyinka,

Thank you for your review and rating.
We are delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Thank you for commending one of our service teams Mr. Jamiu and our services. 
We are glad that you were impressed with our services.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Eniola Mutahiru
review_text: {"en": "Executive and secure facility with good accessibility"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Eniola,

Thank you for your rating.
We look forward to welcoming you soon at the Hotel.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Seun Okonma
review_text: {"en": "The hotel is situated on Isaac John Street at GRA Ikeja Lagos. It is a great facility with good security and assisted parking area. Nice swimming pool. The restaurant serves great food. The meeting rooms are well equipped. The ambience is great."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear SeunOk,

We appreciate your positive comment and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We look forward to welcoming you again in the near future.

Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Micheal Oyormide Ayomiwa Etiwe
review_text: {"en": "A place that gives you the international touch in a local way... Nice architecture, beautiful inner and outer finish, classic feel all the way!!! So if you thinking of a cosy venue for you matured meeting or you want to wow your better half to a lovely matured peaceful time or you just want to hangout and explore then I recommend you try this place out... Trust me you love everything minute of your time spent there... Nice service the workers are always available and willing to help or tend to your needs with no hussle... No bad vibes just fun with their DJ and live music to go cool bar and lounge hangout plus excellent halls not to mention their rooms and suites!!! I always have a nice time when ever am there I hope you do too and share with me!!!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Michael,

We are thrilled by your comment and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

The management and staff here really appreciate your patronage & feedback and we look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Best Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Dipo Adesida
review_text:
{"en": "It’s the new jewel of Ikeja GRA; large lobby, restaurant and pool side.

Always a beehive, although the size easily accommodates pretty much everyone.

Their halls are nice for small and medium sized events.

Parking is average. The underground parking lots can get easily filled up but if you are chauffeur driven, then you need not worry - your driver will be fine.

Watch out for the scanning procedure as you drive in though; could take a few minutes."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Dipo,

We appreciate your feedback and we look forward to welcoming you again.

Regards,

Jeffrey J"}}

author: Frank Osin
review_text: {"en": "Effortless State-of-the-art place., And this time they get all the stars from me for this one., please come and Experience elegance cause you belong here! Everything was extraordinary well designed... Rooms with Luxury Amenities, and great great service! Had to type the great twice! 😁 …"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Frank,

We appreciate your patronage, awesome comment and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Regards,

Jeffrey J.
PA to GM"}}

author: Oge Orisakwe
review_text: {"en": "I was here for a shoot and we chose the loft. I loved the room & service so much. Quite expensive but it comes with dinner & breakfast for two. Their quickness to resolve customer complaints was quite remarkable. Overall, my experience was enjoyable."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Oge,
Thank you for your review and rating.
We look forward to welcoming you on your next visit.
Kind regards
CA"}}

author: Raphael
review_text: {"en": "In my humble (and probably non professional) opinion, this is most beautiful hotel in Lagos. It's got super interior design with unconventional finish and fittings. The lobby area is art in itself. It is a show of architectural excellence! Exquisite restaurants and world-class service. Beautiful swimming pool with lovely outdoor seating. The rooms speak volumes to how much detail and work was put into them. The bar area as cozy as you will find. I could go on and on, but I'm sure you get picture."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Rafael,

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: Nooriya Oyesanwo
review_text:
{"en": "One of the best hotels in Lagos. I’m not in the mood to type much but I totally recommend
The reception is very nice, from the gate to the front desk.
Really nice ambience, the rooms are top tier.
Again, I totally recommend"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Oyesanwo,

We appreciate your review and rating. We believe from your review that you enjoyed your stay with us. 

Thank you for your commendation. We are glad that you were impressed with our services.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Abraham Baptiste
review_text: {"en": "I dare say that this is the best hotel in Lagos at the moment. I'm not quite sure how they've done it but the rooms instantly feel like home. The decor, lighting, view, sheer space of the room, the tub, everything works in such wonderful harmony I was quite sad to check out. Then the restaurant. Breakfast, brunch and lunch is a lush, indulgent spread, again the best I have seen in Lagos. I couldn't even try it all if I could. And I so badly wanted to. Although while I was there, there was an incident where I forgot my glasses by the pool after a night swim. It took them an inordinately long time to find it which is weird seeing as they have a Lost and Found department and CCTV cameras. Otherwise, my stay was without blemish."}

author: John Awotwi
review_text:
{"en": "Clean
Very comfortable place, spacious
Security, seems to be a priority. Metal detectors at the entrance plus a hand search after.
Great food from a fantastic chef. Large variety to choose from.
Conference facility is too notch too."}

author: Xtiana T
review_text: {"en": "I got the best service ever at the bar by the waiter Mr. Tony Obande, he is very friendly and I had the best cocktail.\nI got an excellent service and  my kids were happy for the suggestion he made for the cocktail.\nWe cannot wait to come back again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Xtiana,

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey J

review_text: {"en": "Good conference rooms, with various size capacity to meet your participants number.\nGood customer relation, and food (buffet) options.\nGreat view of surrounding environment from the building."}

author: Samuel U.
review_text: {"en": "Had a great time with my beautiful wife and our guests on her birthday at Iyeru okin restaurant raddison blue ikeja today.The meals were all on point. Abiola,Amara,favour and the rest of  the restaurant staff you guys were great. keep up the great job."}

author: Damilare Okunola
review_text:
{"en": "I know I had visited this place for different reasons, for different events... on different occasions.

But my most recent visit exposed me to quite a number of things.

First, I got to know how CHEAP it is to use such a magnificent and beautiful place. Plus, their services are top notch; really not sure if you can get such around at the same rate.

Funnily, as big as the place is, it can hold even more events that what it looks like on the outside.

Massive, massive place... it’s an extremely beautiful edifice for corporate activities."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Damilare,

We are wowed by positive comment and rating and we say a big THANK YOU.
Please do visit us again.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey J.

author: Olakunle Apara
review_text: {"en": "Fantastic place, great ambience and well secured. Full Covid-19 protocol put in place to keep visitors safe.\nParking lot available for cars with security in place to safeguard them.\nPrompt service from the concierge and front desk officers. Will definitely visit again soon"}

review_text: {"en": "Beautiful place with beautiful ambience.. It has a ramped entrance and steps as well. Their internal decor has a lot of glassworks. This does not include drinks.\n\nI haven't lodged in their rooms.. s8 can't say about their accommodation."}

author: Mehnriobose Divinefavour Usifoh
review_text: {"en": "I enjoyed every bit of my stay. The scenery, the food was on point.\n\nMy room attendant Jamiu did a good job in keeping my space clean"}

author: Patty Writes
review_text: {"en": "Had an unforgettable night in this hotel. Wish I didn't have a journey to catch up with the following day. This is my second time at Radisson Blu, Ikeja Lagos and I will keep returning to this hotel if need be. I recommend the exquisite Amani Spa as well. The Amani Spa is right inside the hotel, it features the best spa facilities you can ever think of. How about the food? Read my lips, it is worth it! You'll be satisfied to the core. Overall, the hotel is very atmospheric and has a very professional and well-mannered staff."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Patty Writes,

We are delighted to read your comment and understand you have fully enjoyed your stay, our facilities and service offerings.
Delivering memorable moments every day, everywhere, every time and offering first class service is our watchword.
We continue to strive for efficiency and simply enjoyable experiences for all our guests and your review gives us great motivation.
We love hearing positive experiences from our guests and we hope you'd visit us again in the not too distant future.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: James Shalom
review_text: {"en": "Nice place & friendly staff.\nThe only thing here is that when you go for buffet & you want to eat African Dish that requires you to use your hands, they don't have where to wash your hands. I was asked I have to go to the rest room to wash & then come back.🙄 …"}

{"en": {"text": "Dear James,

Thank you for your feedback.
Be assured that corrective measures have been taken to rectify our shortcomings.
We expect you again.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Chidera Aniagolu
review_text: {"en": "Having stayed at Radisson Blu Hotel, Lagos Ikeja, I can confidently say it offers a luxurious experience with modern, well-appointed rooms that made my stay incredibly comfortable. The dining options were impressive, featuring a variety of high-quality local and international dishes, and the service was always attentive and friendly. I also appreciated the emphasis on safety and security, which made me feel at ease in this well-located hotel in Ikeja."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Chidera,

Thank you so much for your detailed review of your stay at Radisson Blu Hotel, Lagos Ikeja.
We're thrilled to hear that you had such a comfortable and luxurious experience with us. 
It’s wonderful to know that our modern, well-appointed rooms, attentive service, and diverse dining options all contributed to making your stay memorable.

We take great pride in providing a safe and secure environment for our guests, so we're pleased that our safety measures and security made you feel at ease.
It’s also great to hear that you found our location convenient for exploring nearby attractions in Ikeja.

Your kind words about our staff and the amenities we offer truly motivate us to continue delivering top-notch experiences for all our guests. 
We look forward to welcoming you back for another exceptional stay soon.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management and Team."}}

author: Iji Kolade
review_text: {"en": "The AMANI AND WELLNESS SPA ♨ services is a very unique spot and wellness centre. I was treated the best way possible. The masseuse 💆🏿‍♂️ was a very productive person with the needed touch. I really had a good experience at the spa."}

author: Amr Nosseir
review_text:
{"en": "Excellent choice for staying in Lagos!
Only draw back is prices are super expensive for Nigeria: 270$ per night

They have several options for dining, rooms are big sizes, convenient, spacious, and luxurious.

Highly recommended if you afford it and wants to stay in  Lagos, mainland part."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Nosseir,

We hope this message finds you well. We sincerely appreciate your valuable feedback and the time you took to share your experience at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Your kind words regarding our hotel being an excellent choice for staying in Lagos are truly encouraging. We are delighted to hear that you found our dining options, spacious rooms, and luxurious ambiance to be convenient and satisfying. Providing a comfortable and memorable experience for our guests is our top priority, and we are pleased to learn that we met your expectations.

We understand that the pricing may be perceived as high, and we continually strive to balance our commitment to quality with fair and reasonable rates. Your feedback is invaluable in this regard, and we appreciate your perspective.

Thank you for recommending Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. It was our pleasure to host you, and we look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back in the future. If you have any further insights or suggestions, please feel free to share them with us.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: JohnO
review_text:
{"en": "Top quality hotel for stay and meetings.  Has a restaurant on the first floor.  Outside of the restaurant there is chill out area together a small swimming pool (not well kept).

The hotel is also used for formal & social functions

Parking available, but it is tight and not well laid out.

Good security-  cars checked as well as bags."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Johnson,

Thank you for your feedback.
We have relayed your comment about the swimming pool to the Maintenance team for corrective measures.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Chinwe Owo
review_text: {"en": "As always, Radisson Blu is a delight to stay. The warmness of the staff, the cozy rooms and nice buffet all day long. I met this Amazing room service guy, Jamiu, very professional and friendly. I look forward to my next stay at the Blu."}

author: kamilu omokide
review_text: {"en": "The facilities are good. It is well located in the Ikeja GRA. I however thought it was poor of them to give a breakfast ticket to a double bed room. They also found it difficult to address obvious complaints.  Their front desk are not empowered. There seems to be minimal trust by management for their staff. The facility is however modern."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Kamilu,

We value your stay with us and also appreciate your constructive feedback.
Kindly note that your comment have been relayed to concerned department for action measures.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J.

I had the most delicious cheese cake from the buffet table. It truly is worth all the hassles."}

review_text: {"en": "Nice hotel, with beautiful rooms. Breakfast buffet has a very good varieties and taste is good as well. Staff were nice, helpful and friendly. Hotel has a very lovely spa too. Our stay there was pleasant."}

author: Donald Hange
review_text: {"en": "A luxurious and comfy place, nice swimming pool, topnotch breakfast, good dining service etc.\nBut there's room for urgent improvement most noticeably in the aspect of restrooms, especially their guest restrooms, they stink.\nMoreso, I observed cases of overbooking"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Donald,

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us as we strive to improve with each and every stay.
Please be assured that we have taken your feedback to heart, and we are doing all we can to ensure this is resolved permanently in the near future. Please, kindly bear with us.
While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the Management & Team."}}

author: Nifemi Odele
review_text: {"en": "My family and I came in for lunch and were met with a delightful dining experience at the Iyeru Okin. Simon waited on us and he was quite courteous and respectful. We had a great time and would definitely be back again."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Nifemi,

We look forward to welcoming you again.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

author: Tolulope Iyedupe
review_text: {"en": "Nice and conducive environment situated in the art of Ikeja GRA but their drivers waiting area at the basement is an eye sour an enclosed place with no windows and there was no air conditioner there feels more like a oven too bad for a 5star hotel like this, my company driver had to go sit on the road side."}

author: V M
review_text: {"en": "Rooms would need to be refurbished but they are big. Apart from that, excellent service, you can see that employees are well trained and efficient, food is really good for quite a raisonnable price in Nigeria. The hotel is close to the airport. Thanks to the team and to the Director. I do recommand!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Dauda,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Your comment will be communicated to the concerned department.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Mercy Keyisola
review_text: {"en": "I saw a review of someone falsely accused of smoking with picture evidence not shown to him but rather to his coordinator. I love reading reviews before booking hotels.This should be a no go area for anyone. I think it’s a bad policy for you to want to ruin someone’s reputation by showing fake pictures to his coordinators and not to him if truly there was any evidence. He even replied all you got on him was false.Avoid this hotel to safe your source of income.\n\nSo because someone happens to be your regular visitor, he doesn’t deserve to see evidence of what he or she did, the next thing was to you reported him to his Coordinator so he would be relieved of his job…. Such a horrible and wicked act. I still insist you all out there try as much as possible to avoid this hotel if it’s not for personal reasons. And familiarity isn’t an option try other hotels to avoid see finish. My two cents."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mercy,

Many thanks for your comment.
Please note that the guest was not falsely accused of smoking. He is our regular guest and he is fully aware that the hotel prohibits smoking in the room, as there are designated areas for smoking.

Kind regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: adeola adeleke
review_text: {"en": "My school's ( yaba college of technology, hospitality department) visit to raddisson blu Hotel, Ikeja,  was amazing. The staff were nice and accommodating, they took their time to explain things to us, showed us their facilities and also answered all of our questions. It was a 10 out of 10 experience"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Adeleke,

We extend our heartfelt appreciation for your kind words regarding your school's visit to Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. It was truly our pleasure to welcome the Hospitality Department from Yaba College of Technology, and we are delighted to hear that the experience was nothing short of amazing.

Our team is dedicated to providing informative and engaging experiences for our guests, and we are thrilled that the staff's efforts were well-received. It's wonderful to know that the explanations, facility showcase, and the Q&A session added value to your visit.

Moreover, we appreciate your perfect rating of 10 out of 10, as it reflects our commitment to delivering exceptional service and creating lasting impressions. We believe in fostering educational interactions and are pleased to have been a part of your learning experience.

Regarding the beautiful group picture that you shared on the review portal, we want to express our gratitude for capturing and hoisting that special moment. We are truly glad that you enjoyed the commemorative photo.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

review_text: {"en": "Great food and presentation! Waiters and hostess are very nice🥰. Took a while to receive orders for appetizers and drinks but overall the main courses were delicious. 😋"}

While we look forward to your visit again, please do enjoy the rest of the season.

The ambience at the hotel itself is superb"}

author: Ulimmeh-Hannibal Ezekiel
review_text: {"en": "An excellent hotel to stay in if you have engagements on the mainland as it's pretty central location-wise right in the middle of Ikeja. The hotel is very modern and clean inside. I really like the decor. I usually stay in the Radisson Blu hotel in Victoria Island, but I must say this is just as good in terms of decor. I'd highly recommend this place."}
owner_responses: {"en": {"text": "De\\at Sir, many thanks for telling us how much you enjoyed and appreciated our facilities and servies. Looking forward to your next visit. Regards\nGeorge"}}

author: Roaming Spirit
review_text: {"en": "Not much of an option for vegetarians. Club Sandwich and coffee or beer .\nChef is not interested to make a vegetarian option out of the available menu.\nI believe they want you to buy the buffet instead. The decor indoors is fascinating and modern. Outside near the pool , is just average overlooking Ikeja residential and greenery surrounding it."}

author: Joshua Okpara (PJayMax)
review_text: {"en": "I recently dined at CUT Restaurant in the Radisson Blu Hotel, Ikeja, Lagos, and had an exceptional experience. The ambiance was elegant, creating a relaxed yet upscale atmosphere. The food was impeccably prepared, with each dish bursting with flavor. The steak, in particular, was perfectly cooked, tender, and juicy, accompanied by delicious sides that complemented it well. The service was attentive and professional, enhancing the overall dining experience. Whether you're looking for a fine dining experience or just a casual meal, CUT Restaurant delivers on all fronts. Highly recommended!"}

author: Philips Sobande
review_text: {"en": "5 Star all the way for me. Excellent Hotel, customer service, neat and luxurious rooms, courteous staff, the parking hot but cool. The Bar, on point. The location is excellent.\nNice place to visit as home away from home, and kids friendly too."}

author: Temitope Saliu
review_text:
{"en": "I was at Radisson Blu for a conference last Friday and it is one of the absolute best hotel I have ever been to.
The Ambience is Amazing and Luxury is written all over it.
The artworks are incredibly beautiful and definitely expensive.
It's a place definitely for the High Networking Individuals, Expertriates & foreigners as most people were there meet ups and business transactions.
All together...it was an incredible experience for me."}

author: Sagir
review_text: {"en": "This is one of the 5 star hotel in Lagos. Wheelchair accessibility yes, cosy yes, rooms are very spacious and comfortable. Staff are friendly and welcoming. The security is too notch. The pool area is great to chill out. The conference hall is great. The lift work with your room keys. This hotel is super great. The only thing why I hold my 1 star is the price of food and beverage in the hotel is at the high side."}

author: Elliot Faminu (Ellibobo)
review_text: {"en": "Fair rates with complimentary breakfast for one only. Good food service, small variety of Nigerian foods. Gorgeous lobby, few plug-in stations for laptop/ phone. author: FUNMI
review_text: {"en": "Great lunch experience. Car park gets full quickly but it’s not advisable to park just outside the hotel so your car doesn’t get towed away by the enforcement officers."}

author: Soulsuv

We wish you a Merry Christmas and look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing and memorable stay. ✨

Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of management and team."}}

author: Mohamed Badawi
review_text:
{"en": "I don't know where to start but this establishment needs attention from Radisson chain management. I did not choose to stay there as I was on a business trip for several long stays. You certainly feel that the hospitality isn't genuine and rather forced on most of workers. I had numerous occasions where I just wanted to check out of there and not waste my time complaining.
Guest services most of the time just ignore you if you call for maintenance or house keeping. Also room dining is extremely inconsistent, the same dish can be either amazing or inedible or anything in-between, several times even with stomach troubles for several hours. During my stay I avoided eating for 8 hours before work just incase it's a bad day.
I was falsely accused of smoking in room with a cleaning fine and a prosecution style interrogation even though I smell cigarettes and weed in all floors especially in weekends, I assume they randomly accuse guests of policy busts just to justify their duties. During this funny investigation a not so nice lady furiously threatened me with evidence of me smoking in the room and denied showing it to me. As I stood my grounds and insisted back that it's a false silly claim she backed off as if this was a final warning for an act I didn't commit in the first place.
Long story short, please avoid this place unless you're there for short stay or else you can find close hopefully better places to stay.
Edited:
Replying to your comment below, As I mentioned the evidence you have was not shown to me eventhough I asked repeatedly to see it. I'm absolutely sure it's either untrue or fake photos as I was the only one in the room for the whole stay and I didn't smoke in it full stop. no further discussion.
And our coordinator has nothing to do with this issue and have no right to apologise on my behalf. You only need to speak with the guest with this matters."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mohamed,

Thank you for your feedback.
We truly apologize for the inconvenience you experienced during your stay.
The management did investigate the cigarette perceived in the room you stayed in and confirmed with picture evidence that cigarette filters and a cigarette box were found in your room. The picture evidence was shown to your coordinator and he sincerely apologized for it.
Thank you for staying with us.

Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: flyguy T
review_text:
{"en": "Contemporary design with comfortable bed..

The hotel is located 9km away from the airport. The staffs are friendly and courteous. I was upgraded to the suite room which comes with 2 levels.
The gym and pool are a bit small but sufficient. 2 restaurants and a bar lounge.
Overall I enjoyed the stay. 1 of the best hotels that I have stayed so far in Lagos ."}

review_text: {"en": "I stayed here this past April and it was an amazing experience. The staff was very very polite and friendly. The hotel was clean snd service was excellent.The food and buffet style was very tasteful and overall i really loved my stay here that i cannot wait to visit again"}

author: Ultraman
review_text:
{"en": "House keeping and cleaning needs some serious attention this picture is an African foot print from outside my window I was trying to clean it and is impossible.
Room smells dump and moulded air quality is unhealthy.
My room was very noisy as if I was sleeping on the  car way every honk.
Don't be fooled by the nice furniture big rooms and smart design."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Paxtu,

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel.
Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay.

I was very disappointed to read of your experience of the smelling room and the unhealthy moulded air quality during your stay with us.
Whilst an apology will regrettably not alter the outcome of your experience on this occasion, I do extend it with all sincerity.
I certainly empathise regarding the points you mentioned in your review, especially with the noise from car honks coming from outside the room you stayed. This does not reflects the high standard of quality and service that Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja is usually proud to offer.
We have taken appropriate measures to make sure we do not have a repeat of this and to make your next stay with us much pleasant.

Kindly send us the details of the room number you stayed in, date of your arrival and departure via mail on jeffrey.jikiemi@radissonblu.com, as this information will enable us have a full follow up on the room for corrective measures.

Once again, please do accept our sincere apologies. We hope that this does not deter you from visiting the hotel in the future.

We look forward to welcoming you again so we can make things right.

Sincerely,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
Personal Assistant to General Manager"}}

author: Isaac O.
review_text: {"en": "Awesome hotel, great prices and comfortable, king-size rooms and beds. Food is excellent and staff are the most friendly. Parking is in-house with on-ground security to direct traffic to appropriate parking yards. Best patronized by expatriates and professionals."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Isaac,

We appreciate your good comment and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Ibraheem Dooba
review_text: {"en": "It's said to be the most luxurious hotel in Nigeria. Courteous staff. I enjoyed the food and the gym. I also took inspiration from the artworks displayed on the walls.\n\nWhen I visited in March 2017, they said it was only four months old."}

author: Morenikeji Aiyemoniafe
review_text:
{"en": "Serene atmosphere, ambience was great. It was a buffet so I tasted as much food as i could (in small portions though 😂😂).

The mashed potatoes was made to perfection(i loved it) the barbecued wings i didn’t really like because it wasn’t well seasoned.
Tasted the fish in a sauce(can’t remember the actual name of the sauce) and it was mind blowing

I would like to suggest that Iyeru Okin could have subtle music going on in the background preferably jazz just to spice the place up a bit.

All in all my experience was wonderful and i would definitely be going back."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Morenikeji,

We are delighted to receive your encouraging comments on our facilities, environment and food.
Our aim is to consciously maintain a reputable guest service standard that would continually meet your demands as an esteemed guest.
Your feedback is valuable to us and will definitely be shared with the team to continue to inspire and motivate them to deliver exceptional guest services and to keep striving for excellence in quality.
Your comment is encouraging and at the same time indicative of areas we need to improve.
We are glad that you'll be visiting again and we look forward to hosting you.

Best Regards,

Jeffrey J

author: Tonte Davies
review_text: {"en": "Went there to visit a guest. Had breakfast. There were lots of people having breakfast at the time. I observe reservations are usually made ahead to have a meal. I believe it is to take into account costs to be charged against guests expenses."}

Thank you for your review and rating.
Many of our guest prefer to make their reservations well ahead before their arrival. However, we also accommodate walk-ins. All theses are in a bid to deliver premium service to all of our estimable guest.
We hope you enjoyed your breakfast with us.
We look forward to welcoming you and your family soon.

SGN
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Ogundiran Samuel
review_text: {"en": "I will say this is a perfect hotel, from their rooms, to their services and overall the staffs. I have also had their buffet and OMG!! It was a wonderful one. I love this hotel, I recommend and I will surely visit here more often."}

{"en": {"text": "Dear Ogundiran,

Thank you for taking the time to share with us your positive feedback after your recent stay with us at Renaissance Lagos Ikeja Hotel.

I am delighted to hear that the staff were so friendly and welcoming.  Your commendations of rooms, the restaurant, and in particular the wine list, are highly valued. I wish to assure you that we have congratulated the Ambassadors for doing such an outstanding job!

Guest feedback is imperative for us to ensure that we are meeting and exceeding our guests’ expectations.  Your comments are therefore much appreciated, and we hope to welcome you to Renaissance Lagos Ikeja Hotel again soon.

Kind Regards
Omotoyosi Shittu."}}

author: Motolani Aransiola
review_text:
{"en": "Luxury 💯
Had a night here and I just wanted to be here forever 🤩My goodness, Money is GOOD! Money must be made!!!

It’s been a stressful month at work; the work load, long hours and I managed add insomnia to the cart🤦‍♀️ Of course I was at Radisson Blu for a work meeting on that precious Monday but as luck would have it I ended up earning the room alongside some other works too but I gladly accepted it.

The highlight of my stay was the steady run of hot water in the bathtub, goodness me! The fact that the hot water was readily available was all of it for me (I have a bathtub in my apartment but not hot water supply, yea Lagos houses🤦‍♀️)
Had a long long soak in the bathtub before bed and did same the next morning, even washed my dreads.
And breakfast was a delight too.
Trust me, the aesthetics designs and settings got me relaxed and I would have probably lazied around on Tuesday if my work wasn’t so demanding 😂
Yea, I enjoyed every minute spent here, every minute!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Motolani,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: Chuka Adibuah
review_text: {"en": "Nice hotel with contemporary amenities and furniture. To be honest I set my expectations about this place low but my expectations were exceeded. Stayed in a 2 bedroom suite on the sixth floor in preparation for an event. I'm happy with what I saw. Few little things put me off like not having soap in the toilet downstairs, or not enough towels (these can be fixed easily).\nAs with most things in Nigeria, my little worry is the maintenance culture and if this high standard will be consistently upheld at this hotel.. Only time will tell..\nThat being said I'll definitely consider staying here again in the future."}

author: Akindele Goodluck
review_text:
{"en": "One of the finest hotels located in the Ikeja GRA area. The hotel structure boasts a contemporary modern design with plush furnishings.

The entrance is wheel chair accessible. Wheel chair accessible parking too is available.

This hotel hosts both guests as well as serves as a popular venue site for hosting events in its conference halls.

Mind you, the hotel is not cheap but well worth the money.

Hotel staff are polite and courteous.

Security is top notch.

Cash, Debit and credit card payments are readily available here."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Goodluck,

We are thrilled by your positive comments and we look forward to hosting you again soonest.

Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Jane Ezemba
review_text: {"en": "Very nice and comfy hotel with a touch of elegance. Nice view from the 1st floor and upward due to the glass windows. There are functioning Tvs in the rooms to keep you entertained,  electric kettle, tea, milk, water and brown sugar are available in the rooms as well. Air conditioning is top notch ...very cool. Has 2 gigantic mirrors....hair dryer is also available....there's a pool too! The toilet is very neat and comfortable... towels are also available, shower cap, soap, shampoo, lotion bodywash etc are available as well incase you don't have one. The rooms have a sensor card to ensure safety and security...kitchen service is A1! The food tastes really really good and it's like a feast but you must spend money🙃."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Jane,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: chy esoro
review_text: {"en": "Great place but very expensive. We hosted an event, we needed lunch for 20 extra people, they insisted on immediate cheque for the over shoot, even b4 agreeing to. They kept the guests waiting even as we were sorting the issue. As a company and Key account we could have reconciled after the event not in the midst of event. Embarrassing our guests. Seems like a strictly financially driven company,  zero human face 😭😢😵😷 Giving people ticket to be presented at buffet before dinning is very awkward and subtly insulting,  I would rather not eat except I am starving. Even the staff were afraid of the Financial guy. No No"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Chy esoro,

Thank you for taking the time to inform us about your comments after your recent event at Radisson Blu Hotel, Lagos Ikeja. Your feedback is highly valued and will be used constructively to maintain and improve, where necessary, our standards of service and facilities.

Please accept my sincere apologies for the discomfort and inconvenience you and your guests experienced. Your feedback regarding the lack of sensitivity from our team by no means reflects the high standard of quality and service that our Hotel is usually proud to offer. Do note that we have taken appropriate measures with the team in ensuring that when dealing with guests they ensure human sensitivity is taken into consideration.

As a company we do recognize that there may be a need to have a credit account opened with our hotel. For this reason we have made this payment medium open to interested clients who can meet the requirements. Once all necessary paper work and due diligence is carried out successfully the option of post event reconciliation becomes available. For future events we would like to open this up to your company to begin the application process. That way such demands for on the spot payment would not be required.

Without your comments, we would never know when we are doing right, but more importantly, when we are doing wrong! Thank you for assisting us to strive for service excellence.

Regards,
Ada M.
Dir. of Sales and Mkt"}}

author: Omobolanle Senbanjo
review_text: {"en": "Ambiance is great, great pool view, service can be slow when there is a crowd especially lunch time. I will recommend dinner time  for a small celebration. Good customer service."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Omobolanle,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Please note that your comment on slow service have been communicated to the management for action.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Stay Safe & Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J
PA to GM"}}

author: feyisara giwa

{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Giwa,
Compliment of the Season
Thank you for your review and rating.
We are delighted that you enjoyed our Sunday Dinner Buffet with variety of dinner options.
Thank you for your commendation on our Cakes and on our service staff team. We are also find our service delivery great and our facility good.
We look forward to your visit again, please.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Temitope Ojediran
review_text:
{"en": "I am a student of Yaba College Of Technology, me and my coursemate went on a tour at Radisson Blu Hotel. Our experience was top notch, right from the security at the gate to the front of the house down to the back of the house.
The environment was serene and clean, i noticed that the communication flow between each department is accurate. The HR department are really superb they gave us a nice treat, our tour guide is from HR department  he gave us a listening ear and he gave a well detailed information we need to know. We were taken to all department and all head of department were hospitable.
Radisson Blu Hotel  is where i will love to visit again and even tell people about the hotel.
Thanks for welcoming us we really do appreciate."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Dorcas,

We hope this message finds you well. On behalf of the entire team at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, I would like to express our sincere gratitude for your positive feedback regarding your recent tour of our hotel.

We are thrilled to hear that your experience was top-notch, from the moment you arrived at our gate to exploring various departments within the hotel. Creating a serene and clean environment, coupled with effective communication between departments, is something we prioritize, and we're delighted to learn that it resonated with you.

Our Human Resources team is particularly pleased to hear about your positive interactions during the tour. It's our pleasure to provide well-detailed information and make your visit informative and enjoyable.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja for your tour, and we truly appreciate your intention to share your positive experience with others. Should you have any further questions or if there's anything else we can assist you with, please feel free to reach out.

We look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back to Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja in the future.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: 'Tunde Akinyosotu
review_text: {"en": "It has an heavy presence of security operatives. The staffs are very courteous neat and with a great warm smile. It's a nice place for family getaway. I also think it's not that expensive"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Tunde,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Deborah Oden
review_text: {"en": "We had an event on the second floor and  I must say that the hall was conducive and well organised."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Oden,

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback regarding your recent experience at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja. We are delighted to know that your business event held on the second floor met your expectations.

It is encouraging to hear that you found the hall conducive and well organized. Your commendation is a true reflection of the dedication our team puts into ensuring successful and seamless events for all our guests.

We look forward to welcoming you again soon, whether for another event or a personal stay.

Best regards,
Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Ruth Aragbada
review_text:
{"en": "I was here for an art exhibition by Sylvester Aguddah and when I was done, I decided to go round and also have lunch.
Although I have been here severally, when it was still Renaissance Hotel, held a few events here.

I love the ambiance, the interior and it’s very modern, totally different from the hotels you will usually find on the mainland.

I particularly don’t like the customer service, they are quite nonchalant towards the clients need.

A typical example was the table we sat to eat, it was so dusty and the waiter didn’t think it was okay to clean the table before serving the food, beyond that. It’s perfect for travels, holiday inn, if you are new in Lagos and need a hotel, you should definitely check Radisson Blu out.

It’s welcoming to all and picture perfect 😁"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Seyi,

We appreciate you taking your time to give us your candid feedback on your experience at the hotel.
We sincerely apologise for poor service you experienced and please be assured that your comments have been taken to heart and addressed with the people concerned, and that corrective action will been taken.
We look forward to welcoming you again so we can make things right.

Sincerely,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
EA to GM"}}

author: Emmanuel Obiwulu
review_text:
{"en": "If only there was a zero star option, would have chosen that.
After having a great experience few months ago, I had a terrible time at the AGPMPN Lagos conference.
Staff were abrupt and rude, elevator from the car park was out of service, food was rationed and the wait staff poorly trained.
Please if an association cannot afford your rates, don't lower standards to accommodate mediocrity. Only bright spot is a security man in the car park..he was cheerful and well behaved."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Emmanuel,

Thank you for your candid review.

We sincerely apologise for your negative experience during your event.

Kindly note that your feedback has been communicated to the management and measures are been taken to rectify our shortcomings.

We were delighted to receive your commendations about the impressive service offered by Bright.

We hope your experience would not deter you from visiting us again. We want to make things right by showing hospitality at its best.

Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: Franklin Ugobude
review_text: {"en": "I had a good time at the Radisson Blu. The breakfast options were great and the bacon was one of the best I’ve ever had. The rooms looked like a complete work of art and the staff were absolutely nice. The pool is also a good place to relax and the Amani Spa is worth your money. I was also impressed with the decor and the cleanliness of the rooms and the spa generally."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Frank,

Thank you for your review after staying with us at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja, we are glad you had a wonderful experience and we hope to welcome you soon!

Warmest regards
Esther U."}}

review_text: {"en": "Great hotel, close enough to airport for rapid transfer. Decent bar and food.\n\nStaff very friendly and helpful, the room was well presented and comfortable"}

Your compliments about our friendly and helpful staff mean a lot to us, and we're thrilled that you found your room comfortable and well-presented. We strive to provide exceptional service and comfort to all our guests, and it's wonderful to hear that we succeeded during your stay.

Warm regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu

review_text: {"en": "Ì love the glass floors and stairways. The Christmas decor   was beautiful, I thought I was in Las Vegas walking through the blue and white light. author: Oluwaseyi Ojewuyi
review_text: {"en": "My visit to the Radisson Blu hotel along the popular Isaac John road in Ikeja GRA was alongside my visit to Marcellina's Place, an event center that happens to be beside the hotel. The entrance can be quite confusing as there's a mini-version of the big hotel building on the other side by the exit gate. The appearance and ambience from the entrance to the reception and the stair wells leading to the upper floors are quite nice with beautiful lightings, fixtures and fittings. The restrooms are pretty comfy too. There's a nice bar on the ground floor level by the lobby with a pool table and a lovely sitting area to just chill and lounge. Parking seems adequate and environment is calm and serene."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Oluwaseyi,

Thank you for your review and rating.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

review_text: {"en": "This is a five star hotel for a Nigeria standard though. The rooms are quite exquisite, there are basic to executive suites depending on your preference. There's definitely swimming pool, snooker area, Bar with assorted and exquisite drinks, and lots more. There's definitely room for improvement."}
