author: Sandra Patrick
review_text: {"en": "My visitation tour at the Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja. It was a wonderful experience on the tour. The human resources training manager, Mr. Kyris, took us on a tour around the hotel premises, where every department head taught us everything we would need to know about the hotel. The engineer manager taught about the air conditioning they are using in the hotel, which is centralized air conditioning. The staffs were really hospitable and professional, the serene and beautiful environment speaks volume, their cookies are to die for. All in all it was a nice and educative tour."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ms. Patrick,

We trust this message finds you well. On behalf of Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, we would like to express our sincere appreciation for your kind words and positive feedback regarding your recent visitation tour.

We are delighted to hear that your experience was wonderful, and we are particularly pleased that Mr. Krys, our Human Resources Training Coordinator provided you with valuable insights during the tour. It is our commitment to ensure that each guest, whether on a tour or staying with us, receives a comprehensive understanding of our hotel and its various departments.

We are also thrilled that you found our staff to be hospitable and professional. Creating a welcoming and professional environment is a key priority for us, and it is gratifying to know that our team's efforts are reflected in your experience.

Your mention of the centralized air conditioning system and the insights shared by our Engineering Manager is appreciated. We believe in transparency and providing our guests with a deeper understanding of the operational aspects that contribute to their comfort during their stay.

It brings us immense joy to know that you enjoyed the serene and beautiful environment of our hotel. Additionally, your appreciation for our cookies is truly heartening.

Thank you once again for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja for your visitation tour. We value your feedback, and we hope to have the pleasure of welcoming you back for a stay in the future.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Stephen Dominic
review_text: {"en": "A very conducive environment, good location, easy to locate , a 5 star hotel in the capital city of Lagos state Nigeria, with well trained staff and best management.Anytime your in Nigeria try to stay hear and you won't regret it"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Stephen,

Thank you for taking the time to share with us your positive feedback after your recent stay at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja Lagos.

I am delighted to hear that the staff were so friendly and welcoming.  Your commendations of the Hotel and the Management are highly valued. We have congratulated the Ambassadors for doing such an outstanding job!

Guest feedback is imperative to ensure that we meet and exceed our guests’ expectations.  Your comments are therefore much appreciated, and we hope to welcome you to Renaissance Lagos Ikeja Hotel again soon.

Kind Regards
Omotoyosi Shittu."}}

author: Ifeanyi Uddin
review_text:
{"en": "Got in to the hotel at 2.00pm. Someone dropped the menu. Didn't show up again until 3.24pm.

Security put in a call to the driver. I had to amuse myself for the 10 minutes it took him to show up."}

We appreciate your feedback and we sincerely apologize for all the inconvenience you experienced during your stay with us.
Please note that concerned department have been informed and action has been taken.
We hope this negative encounter would not deter you from visiting us again in the future.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.

{"en": {"text": "WoW! You thrilled us with your great comment, Endurance.

author: Tobi Stark
review_text: {"en": "Radisson Blu Ikeja is one of the Radisson family hotels located around Ikeja GRA. It's a big luxury hotel which is customary of the Radisson family. I think the best thing I like about Radisson is the way the rooms are designed. It looks a lot modern, spacious and not usual, however, the room we were given seems like it wasn't cleaned before we were allocated to the room as we found soap bars on the bathroom floor and palm prints on the bathroom glass demarcation. That was bizarre of a supposed 5-star hotel. We also weren't given bath robes and bath slippers, and after I requested at the reception, it still didn't come. The food, however, was really  good but expensive, which is expected. The staff were quite professional, which is expected of an international standard hotel. I got a discount on my room, which I very much appreciated but I think it's weird that breakfast is for one person when a room is reserved for two. That should be looked into. I enjoyed my stay at the hotel, and the bed is super comfortable. It's arguably the 3rd best bed I have been opportuned to sleep in, which is good. In terms of pricing, I believe Radisson Blu is quite okay in comparison with similar hotels of its range and level, but it's super expensive when compared with hotels in the area. If you want a luxury experience with a modern taste,  you should definitely book a stay at Radisson Blu."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Adegbenro,

Thank you for your review and rating.

We are delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.

Thank you for commending our service team on the top-notch service they rendered to you during your stay. 

We assure you that our service team are professionally trained to deliver the highest service standards to our esteemed guests.

We are glad we made you feel welcome here.

We deeply apologize for the inappropriate state  you met the room and the bathroom, we therefore would look towards this and ensure such would not occur again.
 
Please, do visit us again so that we can extend this top-notch service to you and /or your family again.

While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe. 

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.


Kindest regards
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Pearl I.
review_text: {"en": "Room service was good, complementary breakfast was very good. However, I ordered.the spaghetti bolognaise and chicken breasts for dinner and was very disappointed. The ration served was so small it wouldn't have been enough for even a 6yr old and it was at a cost of 6k! Has to order more food from 'The Place' at of course a much lower price and more quantity."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Pearl,

Thank You for your review and rating. We sincerely apologise for your disappointment in the portion of food delivered to your room, our Executive Chef will have it reviewed. We do hope that You will give us another opportunity to give You a more memorable experience.

Regards
C.A"}}

Your positive feedback is greatly appreciated, and we look forward to hosting you again for more wonderful celebrations.

Best regards, 
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the management and team."}}

author: Lillian Ifeanyi
review_text: {"en": "The service was absolutely amazing by Becky in the restaurant.Absolutely outstanding her customer care service is top notch. The food was as well nice but more options for the buffet will be highly recommended."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Lillian,

author: Diokpa One
review_text: {"en": "Radisson Blu is located on the popular Isaac John Street in GRA ikeja. I thought the hotel was fantastic in terms of service and layout. My room was quite spacious with a walk in shower and tub depending on what you prefer. The hotel though not far from the busy Issac John tends to be quiet. The room had a coffee machine, so you could come with your Nespresso capsules. The room didn't lack mirrors as is the case in some hotels..there was a large one as soon as you walked into the room and another pretty large one at the corner of the room. Excellent water pressure in the shower. Food was good. Breakfast had a lot of variety.  I actually saw they even had ewa agoin. The main restaurant, Iyeru Okin is located on the 1st floor which also has an outside sit out area by the pool as well the Amani Spa. The ground floor  has The Cut restaurant where I had previously had a meal and given a decent review (You may want to check it out). There's also a bar downstairs and various sit out areas. The one thing I thought could be a minus was parking. I got back sometimes and was told there was no parking. Well finally I got a place to park. Parking is underground, but gets full pretty quickly. I thought the Sunday buffet was nice as well. Well, the verdict, Do I think I'll like to come back here anytime soon....YES"}

review_text: {"en": "It is a brand new hotel, opened a few months ago. I came here for a business meeting and everything was just on point. The staff here were very friendly and welcoming. The food here was very good, attentive service, wise wine list selection. Cocktails was not too good and I think the bar staff needs a bit of a training on cocktails. The rooms are very large, with bathtub and shower, good pressure, elegant details and very modern. author: femi adams
review_text: {"en": "Good parking, tight space for a Nigerian environment but being based in the UK, I didn't find it difficult to manoeuvre. Got a good, sort of private spot in the restaurant and this was helpful as I was with family and we wanted to have a chilled time laced with heart to heart talk. The food - the African dishes were spot on, the meat almost melted in the mouth. I recommend the bitter soup. Also recommend the Okro. The fish stew was very nice and we enjoyed the freshly prepared juices but the dessert tasted nothing like they should - asides the fruit medley, everything else didn't make it past the tasting stage. You would argue they do African dishes well but haven't got the hang of the rest. This is true as far as the pasta salads also had a couple of the choice availed us not making it past tasting. Live music present and good atmosphere and decor with friendly staff."}

author: Ursula Ndulue
review_text:
{"en": "Went for a family birthday dinner. Beautiful place.
Buffet was lovely. All food options were nice.
Had a waiter that was rude, but another waiter took over and more than made up for his sloppy service.

Harassed by a security guard for taking pictures within the hotel premises and he said 'nothing will happen'. Took off our mask to take a few pictures and he said something about tolerating us. Lmao. Meanwhile, a group of politicians were unmasked in the same lobby and they weren't approached.
Lol. I don't get the idea behind not taking pictures within a hotel.

Will probably frequent Radisson V.I more. Their service is exemplary right from the front door.
Ikeja staff should be retrained.
Radisson is a brand. Location should not determine service delivery."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ursula,

Thank you for bringing this to our attention.
We certainly empathize regarding your experience with the waiter.
Do bear with us as the COVID19 guidelines advise social distancing and use of nose mask while taking pictures advise otherwise. This is why the hotel policy is strict on photo shoots and any form of picture taking.
Thank you for understanding and we look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Stay Safe,

Jeffrey J."}}

review_text: {"en": "A VIP member of Radisson loyalty program. Checked in the room at 5.30pm. The room was supposed to be ready at 2pm. Once in the room no towels. Went to the concierge, they called the service. No action. Then after a while called again the service from the room. Response \"we are fully booked and we are waiting for the laundry service to deliver the towels. We are working on it. We ll send the supervisor to your room.\" Thd supervisor came to tell me he did not know about the towels he will be ensuring that in 10 mins the towels will be available. Finally .... no towels! RADISSON!"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Luigi,

Thank you very much for your candid review of your recent stay at our hotel. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us as we strive to improve with each and every stay.
We sincerely apologize for the unprofessional conduct of our team. We understand the importance of having you choose our hotel amongst the many hotels in the country and we acknowledge that we fell short in delivering a complete guest experience.
Please be assured that we have taken your feedback to heart, and we are working diligently to rectify this issue. We have implemented measures to ensure that this does not in any way recur again.
Thank you for bringing this to our attention, as it allows us to improve our services and provide a better experience for our valued guests.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future, and we will ensure that your stay is nothing short of exceptional.
While we look forward to your visit again, please do keep safe.
Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja.

Kindest regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the Management and team."}}

author: jayne begho
review_text:
{"en": "My Amani Experience at Radissonblu Ikeja..

I walked in to Amani Spa excited about my win and to be honest  I didn't  build any expectations.  I went in, as a blank sheet of a paper.

From the entrance I was welcomed with a smile and a shot of detox drink.  When I was told "detox" I was worried . Trust me it tasted heavenly 😋.  My expectations started building .

So the sauna was my 1st stop after changing( Your items are safe like it's in Bank vault)

Every woman deserves this type of heat. The feeling  cannot  be described  with words alone . You need to experience it for yourself . For the 1st time since my resumption at a new place of employment I didn't  think of my target. Its like the heat melted the target thoughts .

From the Sauna I was moved to the floating pool. My 1st experience and this was wonderment.. I took a shower, dried myself and glided into the pool. Wonders they say never ends. This is one wonder I didn't  want to end. I literally slept 😴 floating  around.. When I was called to come out reality slapped my face. I wanted to hide. The thought of the next item on the list got me giddy with excitement.  You will not believe  what it was ..

Body Polishing !!! I didn't want no hard scrubs like I was coming from the amazon forest.  When asked by Happiness what pressure would you like applied . I whispered  mild please.
She did just that. Polished my body mildly and I felt  30 years scrubbed off my skin. The 😊 and Happiness my body felt ehn.  I can only say thank you to Happiness for such a wonderful  experience of body polish .

Next stop was the shower and Massage.

The massage was so relaxing.  You know when your body is telling you it's being taken care of. That's exactly  how I felt during this session.

I would love to say a big thank you to the Amani team for such a wonderful experience.

I hope they allow me put this story out there.

I definitely know I will come back again alone and with friends.

This is not something one should experience as a one off."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Jayne,

We are so blown away by your positive comment and perfect rating.
Amani Spa Ikeja team and Radisson Blu Ikeja management extend their sincere appreciation to you.
We look forward to welcoming you again.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Joshua Palfreman
review_text:
{"en": "MAINTENANCE
Extraordinarily poor state of furniture and infrastructure at the Radisson Blu Ikeja. I’d like to share with you, in writing and photographs, some key shockers. Keep in mind—this is a 4/5 star business hotel.

Paneling on buttons and lights on the lifts are often missing or vandalized. Other lights in the lift have not been cleaned of dead insects.

There are surface marks all over the walls in the corridor, the walls of at least 6 bedrooms that I saw and the floors—blatantly demonstrating a lack of rudimentary attention to detail throughout the Radisson Blu Ikeja. To be clear, these are surface marks—they could have been removed by management with a damp cloth.

Most worryingly, every fabric chair and sofa I found, had grease, soil, moisture or food stains on them. Again—one does not have to be resourceful or explore their surroundings to notice these basic shortcomings. To underline—management know about the disrepair of their furniture across the hotel—and, are deliberately and decisively, not acting. Basic upholstery and furniture cleaning sprays—purchased at a local supermarket—could easily fix this disgusting, smelly and unhygienic reality at a 4/5 star business hotel.

Of the six bedrooms that I visited or stayed in during my stay (I complained a few times and was upgraded twice), all felt damp, wet and had a very foul odour, when not blasting the air conditioning at its minimum temperature—it’s best not to install deep, thick carpets in a city with a 70%+ humidity rate—especially if you aren’t going to pay for a carpet cleaning machine. Please also pay attention to your doors (the locks in rooms 333, 427 and 433 are all broken/partly off their hinge (see photo). The toilet in room 427 and 433 is also leaking. The curtains in room 531 and 333 have large holes and brown moisture stains in them—maybe you should wash or replace them?

RESTAURANT / BAR
Much like reception and all general areas of the hotel—the Radisson Blu Ikeja felt severely understaffed. My colleagues and I felt as if we had to hound down waiters for service. While food was okay, a US$45 price tag for a pretty limited buffet dinner, felt excessive, especially considering that drinks were excluded.

NOISE
I notice that the Radisson Blu Ikeja advertises itself as having soundproofing. Perhaps it soundproofs between rooms—but it completely fails to soundproof noise from the very busy highway bordering the hotel. I slept on all four nights with earplugs and slept in rooms on floors 4 and 6, on all sides of the hotel. The hotel is bordered on all sides by very busy and noisy roads. I also noted on my last two nights, that the hotel invited workers to start hammering tiles off of the exterior fountain wall, from 05:00am in the morning. Not very considerate.

PROFESIONALISM
On one memorable evening, after starting to eat dinner with two colleagues, my colleague and I were asked to vacate a table so another guest—allegedly a VIP—could take a selfie by the window we were sitting next to (we said no).

During an afternoon business meeting in general lounge area, of the reception area, my colleagues, our client and I, were told we had to order something, or vacate the seats we had been sitting on, for a mere fifteen minutes (we said no).

Upon complaining about customer service and requesting a quiet room to hold conference calls in, my colleague and I were kindly granted access to the “Executive Lounge” by the hotel manager. We were disappointed to find that this “VIP” lounge also doubles as a venue that the hotel hires out for public photo shoots. The lounge apparently has no service (e.g. no waiters) and serves an extremely limited range of foods (apples, stale deserts from yesterday evening’s dinner buffet and water).

Management at Radisson Blu Ikeja refused to provide agreed, company rates to our new staff, as these staff had not yet received their ID cards. We have since removed this hotel for upcoming trips."}

author: Ikechukwu Robert Mordi
review_text:
{"en": "So after multiple visits to Radisson Blu Ikeja, I was starting to get convinced that apart from the nice facility, that it is also a safe place for everyone. But, boy was I wrong ?
For the first time ever in my life, I was racially profiled. It was a very low and embarrassing moment that I had to be questioned for close to one hour by some guy who's name I pray to forget just because I "attempted" to speak to someone at the reception. Last time I checked, hotel lobby's are public places and talking to someone there has never been a crime. But because I am a Nigerian it became a crime to talk to someone on the lobby because the person is white (nothing else was special) I have never seen someone making so much deliberate effort to embarrass me. I had to put up with all of his rubbish because of the quality of guest that I have there. A copy of my National identity card is currently in possession of a staff named Agnes just to prove whatever point that character wanted to prove.  More annoying is the fact that on several occasions,  I saw random people talking to my guests in that hotel and I didn't see anyone make a fuss about it. They were foreigners as well (I guess it doesn't matter because they were largely dark skinned). That experience is going to live with me for a very long time. And for the first time, I regret recommending Radisson blu. A mistake that will definitely not repeat its self.
If as a Nigerian,  I am less important in any establishment in Nigeria,  then such has no business here. If we have security challenges in the country and you have people who go about harassing people and spreading the narrative that Nigeria is not safe, then you are no different from the characters causing the instability in the country. If talking to someone on the point of personal recognition in your establishment is a crime(or threat to Nationalsecurity) like the characterput it, then print it and hang it publicly.  P.S. I met Aproko Doctor in thatvssme lobby and had a good laugh.
So what is special about your white guests ?? Am still livid."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Mordi 

We appreciate your honest feedback and thank you for sharing them with us. 

We sincerely apologize for the inconvenience, discomfort and embarrassment we may have caused you during your visit at our Hotel. 

We assure you that we frown at all forms of discrimination be it gender, race, religion and/or sexual preference /orientation. We would therefore be escalating your complaint to our management team to prevent a repeat of this occurrence.

author: Moses
review_text: {"en": "Spent two nights at this hotel (June 30-July 2). The room was spacious, and the bed quite comfy. Nice breakfast buffet spread and good facilities. These are the good sides. The bad? The concierges do not seem to know how to assist guests with simple tasks or to help with inquiries; they just stand there in the lobby in groups waiting to help guests load and unload luggage. That's all they seem able or willing to do. The worst aspect of my experience was when I ordered room service and paid with a POS machine with my ATM card. I was clearly charged and as soon as I got the alert on my phone I showed it to the room service lady, but she printed a paper and without showing it to me claimed that there was an error. She pretended to be satisfied when I showed her the evidence that I had been charged. But she returned a few minutes later to ask that I pay again saying the first payment didn't go through. And for good measure she added that this had happened to several guests before, which was revealing and self-indicting. I insisted that I would not pay twice for the same room service, telling her that they should check their payment database since I had clearly been charged. I talked to her supervisor  on the phone and told her the same thing and she said the accounts people would check the next day. The next day, I was harassed with several phone calls telling me that the payment had not come through. I checked my bank account and the payment had indeed gone through, and I told them that. I told them it was not the money but that I did not want to pay twice for the same service. When the harassment didn't stop I gave up and paid cash again for the same room service. I wanted peace and didn't want any embarrassment. Later when I was checking out, I let the front desk people know that I was not happy that I paid twice. They gave me a bogus refund form, which I was reluctant to fill out because I was leaving the country that night and wouldn't be able to follow it up. The guy insisted, so I reluctantly filled it out, with him copying all the payment confirmation info on my phone bank alert on the form. He told me that he would personally follow it up and make sure that the money was refunded to my account even in my absence. It's been almost two weeks since I returned to my base. No refund has entered my account. I am actually convinced that the \"refund form\" is a ruse they use to scam guests and that they throw it away once the guest departs. Such fraudulent behavior is unbecoming of a big brand like Radisson Blue and should be checked. If as the room service lady said this has been happening to guests, which seems true given that they have a refund form on hand to issue, then the management should do something about their electronic payment system so that their staff are not able to claim that there is an error so as to charge guests twice and harass them when they refuse to make a second payment.\n\nUPDATE: I am happy to say that not only did the George Balassis, the General Manager, respond to review here (below), he also emailed me with profound apologies, and then texted me and even offered to call to relate his apology. He requested the details of my payment and my bank information, which I sent to him and he promised that he would ensure that both the initial payment and the second payment were refunded to me. A couple of days later, I was pleasantly surprised to see that he had delivered on his promise. I got a bank alert and when I checked my account, they had indeed refunded my two payments. What is impressive is not an issue-free hotel (every hotel has issues) but how well the hotel responds to a complaint or issue. I could not have asked for a better or more prompt resolution. Thank you Mr. Balassis for being a listening and proactive GM. Your hotel management has earned my respect."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr Moses Ochonu
Thank you for your review. I am glad to hear that some  experience was positive though very  disappointed about the concierge and POS issue. I am personally investigating the latter and our Front team is processing the issue of the concierge.
Our transactions are controlled by strict procedures which is the basis of the integrity of our brand for which I have been the ambassador for two decades.
It is unfortunate but very common in the commerce here that POS's produce technology errors and we are constantly in contact with our Bank provider in order to eliminate such guest dissatisfaction.
I will write to you on your email address to explain the process we will undertake to resolve this problem.

Radisson Blu Ikeja definitely begs your pardon for the inconvenience this may have  caused you and will definitely get back to you on the issue of the POS.
I am looking very much forward to personally welcoming you on your next visit.
kind regards
George Balassis
General Manager"}}

author: Toluwase Ogunsola
review_text:
{"en": "Radisson Blu Hotel in Lagos Ikeja offers a sophisticated and luxurious haven in the heart of the city. From the moment you step through its doors, you're greeted with an air of elegance and a warm welcome that sets the tone for an exceptional stay.

The hotel's contemporary design and chic décor create a visually pleasing environment that appeals to both business and leisure travelers. The spacious rooms are thoughtfully appointed with modern amenities, ensuring comfort and convenience throughout your stay. The plush bedding and attention to detail make each room a comfortable retreat after a day of exploration or work.

One of the standout features of Radisson Blu Hotel is its commitment to culinary excellence. The diverse range of dining options caters to a variety of tastes, from international cuisine to local flavors. Whether you're indulging in a sumptuous breakfast, enjoying a leisurely lunch, or savoring a delectable dinner, the hotel's restaurants offer an elevated dining experience that delights the palate.

The hotel's facilities extend beyond the rooms and restaurants. With its well-equipped fitness center, swimming pool, and spa, Radisson Blu provides ample opportunities for relaxation and rejuvenation. The attentive staff is dedicated to ensuring that your needs are met, adding a personal touch that enhances your overall experience.

The location in Ikeja places the hotel in close proximity to key business districts and entertainment options. This strategic positioning makes it an ideal choice for both business travelers and tourists who want easy access to the city's attractions.

In conclusion, Radisson Blu Hotel, Lagos Ikeja, stands as a beacon of sophistication and comfort in Lagos. From the refined design to the impeccable service, every aspect of the hotel contributes to an unforgettable stay. Whether you're seeking a luxurious retreat or a business-oriented stay, Radisson Blu Hotel offers a seamless fusion of style, convenience, and hospitality."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Mr. Toluwase,

We are absolutely delighted and honoured to read your comment. We are glad  that you to splendidly enjoyed your stay with us at Radisson Blu Lagos, Ikeja.
Your feedback motivates and encourages us at all levels to keep striving for excellence and quality service delivery.
We sincerely appreciate your love toward the antiques of the hotel and of course our delectable culinary excellence as it is our watch ward to serve our guests with the best of cuisines. 
Guest feedback is imperative for us to ensure that we meet and exceed our guests’ expectations.  Your comments are therefore much appreciated, and we hope to have the privilege of welcoming you to Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja Hotel again soon.

Thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja

Kindest regards
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of Management & Team."}}

author: Abundance Lemchi
review_text:
{"en": "The Radisson Blu Hotel in Ikeja, Lagos, Nigeria has an average rating of 4.2 out of 5 stars based on guest reviews. Here's a summary of the pros and cons:

Pros:

- Friendly and helpful staff
- Comfortable and clean rooms
- Good location, close to the airport and city center
- Excellent breakfast buffet
- Nice pool and gym facilities

Cons:

- Some guests found the rooms to be a bit small
- Limited dining options in the evening
- Traffic in the area can be heavy
- Some guests experienced issues with the air conditioning in their rooms

Overall, the Radisson Blu Hotel in Ikeja is a great option for business travelers and those looking for a comfortable stay in Lagos."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear  Abundance,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback about your stay at the Radisson Blu Hotel in Ikeja. 

We are pleased to hear that you enjoyed our friendly and helpful staff, comfortable and clean rooms, convenient location, excellent breakfast buffet, and our pool and gym facilities.

We also appreciate your constructive feedback regarding the room size, limited dining options in the evening, traffic in the area, and issues with the air conditioning, Please be assured that we take your comments seriously and will work on addressing these concerns to improve our guest experience.

Your insights are invaluable in helping us maintain and enhance our services. We look forward to welcoming you back and providing you with an even better stay in the future.

Best regards, 
Omotoyosi Shittu
On behalf of the management and team."}}

review_text: {"en": "The hotel is ok, its clean and all, however the service is erratic, sometimes it is good and others its non existent, the same can be said for the water temperature in the shower  I have slept in 2 different rooms on 2 different occasions and sometimes you get only cold water and on this morning I only had hot. The trick is apparently to run the water in the bath until you get the desired water temp and then go back to the shower. Breakfast is ok but don't expect sweetener for your coffee on the table, and when you ask for it don't expect anyone to bring you any. Other than that the selection is ok. The standard is not what I would have expected from a Radisson Blu. I am a little disappointed"}

author: IGNATIUS UMEZURUIKE
review_text:
{"en": "The Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos is truly a standout hotel in every way. From the moment you step into the lobby, you are greeted with a warm and welcoming atmosphere that sets the tone for a truly exceptional stay.

The rooms at the Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos are spacious, beautifully designed, and equipped with all the amenities one could need. The comfortable beds make for a great night's sleep, and the stunning views of the cityscape are the perfect backdrop for relaxation.

The hotel staff at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos are some of the friendliest and most professional I have encountered. They go above and beyond to ensure that every guest feels valued and taken care of. Whether it's arranging transportation, providing recommendations for local attractions, or simply offering a friendly smile, the staff truly make you feel at home.

One of the highlights of staying at the Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos is the dining experience. The on-site restaurants offer a wide range of cuisines, all expertly prepared and delicious. From breakfast to dinner, every meal is a culinary delight.

The hotel's facilities are top-notch as well. The fitness center is well-equipped, allowing guests to maintain their workout routine while traveling. The pool area is a peaceful oasis, perfect for lounging and soaking up the sun.

Lastly, the location of the Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos is unbeatable. Situated in the heart of Lagos, it is conveniently located near popular attractions, shopping centers, and restaurants. Whether you're traveling for business or pleasure, everything you need is just a short distance away.

Overall, my stay at the Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos was nothing short of exceptional. From the beautiful rooms to the attentive staff, every aspect of this hotel exceeded my expectations. I highly recommend it to anyone looking for a luxurious and memorable stay in Lagos."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ignatius,

Thank you for your review and rating.
We are delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Your positive experiences mean a lot to us.

The rooms are are built to exquisitely suit the taste of our delectable guest and as such we are glad you liked it, and every amenities in it.

I am delighted to hear that the staff were so friendly and welcoming.  Your commendations of  the restaurant in particular is highly valued. I wish to assure you that we have congratulated the Ambassadors for doing such an outstanding job!

Guest feedback is imperative for us to ensure that we are meeting and exceeding our guests’ expectations.  Your comments are therefore much appreciated, and we hope to welcome you to Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja again soon.

Kind Regards,
Omotoyosi Shittu."}}

author: GSD Cocktails
review_text:
{"en": ""Wow! I had an amazing experience at [Radisson Blu Hotel] during our visit for training. The staff there went above and beyond to ensure we received top-notch training and had a memorable stay.

From the moment we arrived, we were greeted with warm smiles and a friendly atmosphere. The hotel staff was incredibly knowledgeable and helpful, providing us with all the information we needed for our training sessions. They were patient and took the time to answer all our questions, making sure we understood everything.

The training facilities at Radisson Blu were outstanding. The rooms were well-equipped, spacious, and comfortable, creating the perfect environment for learning. The hotel's attention to detail in setting up the training rooms was impressive, with all the necessary equipment and resources readily available.

The rooms were clean, cozy, and beautifully decorated, making us feel right at home.

What truly stood out during our visit was the hotel staff's genuine care and dedication to ensuring our training experience was exceptional. They were always ready to assist us with a smile, making us feel valued and appreciated.

I would highly recommend Radisson Blu Hotel to anyone looking for a hotel that not only provides fantastic accommodation but also excels in training services. They truly understand the importance of creating a positive and enriching experience for their guests.

Thank you, Radisson Blu Hotel for the incredible training and wonderful hospitality. We can't wait to visit again!"

From :  Adeoyo Olowo Anifowose
president
Hospitality and Tourism Department (Yabatech)"}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Subject: Exceptional Training Experience at Radisson Blu Hotel

Dear GSD Cocktails,

We are thrilled to receive your enthusiastic feedback regarding your recent training experience at Radisson Blu Hotel. Thank you for taking the time to share your thoughts on the exceptional service you received.

It brings us immense joy to know that your overall experience surpassed your expectations. We take great pride in our commitment to delivering top-notch training services and ensuring that our guests have a memorable stay.

Your kind words about the warm smiles and friendly atmosphere from our staff are truly appreciated. Our team strives to provide a welcoming and knowledgeable environment, and we are delighted to hear that their efforts were recognized. We understand the importance of clear communication and are pleased to learn that our staff addressed all your queries with patience and thoroughness.

We are especially glad to hear that you found our training facilities outstanding. Creating an environment conducive to learning is crucial, and we are pleased that our well-equipped and comfortable rooms contributed to a positive training experience.

Your compliments on the cleanliness, coziness, and beautiful decor of our rooms are heartening. We believe that attention to detail enhances the overall stay, and it's wonderful to hear that you felt right at home.

Most importantly, your recognition of our staff's genuine care and dedication to ensuring your training experience was exceptional is truly gratifying. We believe in the value of personalized service, and it's rewarding to know that our team's efforts had a positive impact on your visit.

Thank you for recommending Radisson Blu Hotel to others seeking fantastic accommodation and excellent training services. We are honoured by your endorsement and look forward to the opportunity of welcoming you back for another wonderful experience.

Once again, thank you for choosing Radisson Blu Hotel. We appreciate your feedback and the privilege of hosting your training sessions.

Warm regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

author: Dorothy Nabakooza
review_text:
{"en": "I rarely give 5stars, so if I do,  you know they exceeded all things.
Amazing and beautiful place,  with kind workers everywhere you go, clean place,  great security,  elevators and lounges almost in every corner.  It's not only a hotel for food and rest,  it also has big and accomodative conference rooms.
They have a private swimming pool probably for residents,  waterfalls,  a terrace and a variety of restaurants.
Security is clear and tight with ample parking space all over.
They have many rooms for residents and the place is quite accessible from the airport. The have quite a huge plot,  you need to inquire and see which services u want. The lounges are really  knew of the most amazing and unique thing I saw there.
If you want transport from the hotel,  you can choose an uber,  a special hire or " Keke" tricycle to take you around.  The Keke's are the cheapest and only acceptable cheap means in this entire joel Ogunaike residential area."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Wow! We are thrilled by your great comment and perfect rating of Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja, Dorothy.
It made our day and we look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey J."}}

author: bassey edoho
review_text:
{"en": "What a hotel! Someone got it right here. Dwarfs competitors easily. They have wheelchair accessible entrance and an ATM. The rooms are of so much comfort. Loved the bed and beddings; soft and right. General room service is timely and precise. Service with a smile. Access to various parts of the facility is easy.
Try out the all-you-can-eat restaurant. The range is interesting; from local to intercontinental to foreign dishes. I actually ate Atama soup, a rare cuisine from the southern part of Nigeria (calabar to be precise) and it was delicious.
Their halls are usually used for classy wedding reception. The interior stands for great bridal pictures and wedding pictures generally. Very Expensive hotel so, it is recommended if you can afford it.

But a man needs to experience such comfort once in his lifetime."}

We  appreciate your patronage as your presence is of utmost value to us. In line with your feedback, kindly accept our sincere apologies for the food that was not child friendly.

The management and the Executive Chef has taken this up as top priority and we assure you an excellent experience on  your next visit.

Looking forward to having you around soon.

Regards,

Jeffrey"}}

author: Elminda Minda
review_text: {"en": "So I decided to have dinner in one of their restaurants,after sitting for 25minutes downstairs no one came to attend to us,then we went upstairs and met one of thier bad-mannered waiters at the door who told us we couldn't come in there with no further explanations,maybe they had a function going on I wouldn't know.Then we came back downstairs again,at that point in time I was getting frustrated already,then I saw a waitress coming in from the poolside or so  and she said to me they were closing that section of the restaurant where we were seated for almost 30minutes already as at 9.45pm.and said to us she will get some one to attend to us,then we waited another 18minutes,So I stood up and went straight to the restaurant with an open kitchen downstairs,luckily for me,the supervisor or the manager,himself approached me,so I shared my ordeal with him hoping he will take our orders right there, he did not and told us some one will do shortly.And after waiting for another 10minutes no one came,So we had to leave, but I made sure I approached their General manager at the front desk who apologised and promised to look into it.In a 🌟🌟🌟🌟🌟hotel😯I  was blown away.the whole scene made me speechless!So for me it a 🌟that was appalling customer service in Raddision blu hotel."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Elminda,

We are extremely sorry that you had to face such difficulties, problems in restaurants is not something we are known for. We pride ourselves in providing great guest service and we would like to do the same for you.

We wish to assure you that your feedback about your service experience at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja is viewed in a serious light.

We may not be able to change the past but if you give us a chance, we will completely make it up to you on your next visit.

Please, kindly contact the Food and Drinks Manager -
Mariam Ogbolu <mariam.ogbolu@radissonblu.com> to get Meal Vouchers as a way of showing you that WE VALUE YOU.

Once again, we tender our apologies as we look forward to welcoming you again.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
Personal Assistant to General Manager"}}

author: Ibelema Emeh
review_text: {"en": "I was due a refund of 240, 000 naira 20th January 2020, from the Raddison Blu Isaac Jones.  I was given a receipt to confirm I would receive this payment. Furthermore,  I was informed that the refund information had been passed on to the accounting department on Monday 20 January at about 11:00am and I was going to be paid the same day. Till date,  despite several emails, I have not receievd this payment or an explanation to the delay. It is extremely important  that organisation such as yours should not  have staff that cannot keep to thier words. Integrity and professionalism is key to any business and I am being  forced to use social media platforms to get this money refunded. I hope your senior management have more intergrity than your junor staff.  Finally, what makes this siutation extremely pathetic is that friends and family that I mentioned this situation have all said it is a deliberate attempt by your staff to keep quiet so they can get the money to themselves. I genuinely hope this is not the case."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Ibelema Emeh,

Thank you for taking the time to give us your valuable feedback.

Kindly accept our sincere apologies for the delay in your refund payment.

Please be assured that your complaint is being investigated and our team has taken the appropriate action to rectify the shortcomings in our service delivery.

Help us fast track this by sending me an email via jeffrey.jikiemi@radissonblu.com, giving detailed information about your event and payment.

Thank you for taking the time to give us your constructive criticism, as it is absolutely necessary for us to know how our guests experience our service.

Be assured that your comments have reached the attention of all involved and have assisted us in creating a commitment to ensure that situations such as these do not arise in the future.

As a valued guest, we value your feedback and hope that this does not deter you from visiting the hotel in the future.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi
PA to GM"}}

author: Oluwole Fadairo
review_text:
{"en": "A friend had a birthday get-together at Radisson Blu GRA Ikeja. The hotel’s ambience and aesthetic is fantastic. They have an underground parking lot which makes sense.

The Iyeru Okin restaurant blew my mind with their on-the-spot Amala with gbegiri/ewedu and assorted meats. Your buffet goes with just a bottle water.

The top of the cherry of the dinner buffet is the cool music from a saxophonist in the restaurant.

But in terms of food offerings, I personally think that Radisson Hotel beats Radisson Blu hands down. Radisson Hotel will still serve you soft drinks even with the  bottled water.

THIS IS THE UPDATE. HOPEFULLY THE FINAL.

I went back to Radisson Blu on Saturday 4th of June 2022 for a birthday celebration dinner buffet. They serves us soft drinks. LOL. I didnt ask before the waiter came to ask so that deserves a thump up.

The food offerings are way better. I ate these prawns with this whit stuff that the waiter said isnt fish. The amala on the spot remains spectacular. I could just take the okra without any solid. That was how good it was.

There was a surprise cake and birthday song from the RadissonBlu Team. That was a wow moment for me. The LondonToLagos bike was also on display. So if I gave RadissonBlu 8/10 before, they now have a 9/10.

Why not 10/10? The parking lot was full and I had to go park somewhere else cos I didnt want to park my car just on the road as suggested by the gatemen.

But yes, I will always come back."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Oluwole,

We appreciate your Patronage, Review, and Rating.
We are also delighted you had a pleasant experience with us.
Your comment will be relayed to the concerned department for review.
We look forward to welcoming you again soon.

Warm Regards,

Jeffrey Jikiemi"}}

author: Fabrice Tima Tchokote
review_text:
{"en": "I use to stay in that hotel everytime I am on business trip in Lagos.

Service is very good in comparison to Nigerian standard, nevertheless there is a potential for optimisation. Personal is polite but seems to be sometime under pressure.

Price-Quality ratio in accordance with the standard of the hotel is good.

Safety procedures and devices are enough.

Swimming pool cool be longer.

Particular advice for foreigner: please do not compare the price with the western prices. It's important to notice that the running costs for keeping habitable and confortable such a nice hotel in such a challenging environment are extremely high."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Dear Fabrice,

Thank you for always staying at Radisson Blu Hotel Lagos Ikeja.
We sincerely appreciate your Loyalty.
Your feedback is valuable to us and will definitely be shared with the team to continue to inspire and motivate them to deliver exceptional customer service. We are delighted to see that you had a pleasant stay with us and we hope to serve you again whenever your travels bring you back to Lagos.

Kind Regards,

Jeffrey"}}

author: Olagoke Orija
review_text:
{"en": "Radisson Magic!!!

The Radisson Blu Hotel Isaac John Ikeja GRA is one of the newly built hotels in mainland axis of Lagos state and within almost a year or a little or a year of existence, this hotel has become the hotel of choice for individuals and corporate customers alike.

It stands out in the Isaac John vicinity and it is beautiful furnished with state of the art aesthetics.

One cannot help but notice the beautiful art works on display in every corner of the hotel.
From the convenience to the meeting rooms, waiting areas, rooms and restaurants as well.

Very yummy continental and African delicacies are served at the Iyeru Ok in restaurant on the first floor.

There's a fairly sized parking at the basement but I must confess that it's extremely hot in there and I wonder the security on guard at the basement do cope with this heat.

The hotel also has very beautiful furnished meetings rooms for corporate gatherings on the ground floor as well as on the second floor."}
owner_responses:
{"en": {"text": "Wow!

Radisson Blu hotel has  events Hall that's more than 2000 capacity.
Radisson Blu hotel rooms are categorized based on price and quality.
Radisson Blu hotel is generally open for everyone irrespective of tribe or country.
Radisson Blu hotel have free car space for car park. Online air ticket is also available for guests.
However, the employment of staff in the hotel is normally done online. Anyone can be employed irrespective of tribe or country.
Radisson Blu hotel has branches in different countries around the world."}

author: David Omololu Aiyeola
review_text: {"en": "I am currently burning hot with anger for all the Radisson hotels especially this one in GRA ikeja. 21 days refund policy? Who does that?"}

{"en": {"text": "Subject: Resolution of Your Complaint Regarding the Refund Policy

Dear Mr. David,

We trust this message finds you well, and we sincerely apologize for any inconvenience you may have experienced regarding the refund policy at Radisson Blu Hotel Ikeja, GRA.

Your feedback is important to us, and we want to assure you that we take your concerns seriously. We understand that a 21-day refund policy may be frustrating, and we appreciate your patience in bringing this matter to our attention.

To address your specific complaint, we would like to inform you that we have reviewed and resolved the issue. If you have further questions or if there are additional details you would like to discuss, please feel free to reach out to us.

If, for any reason, you feel that your complaint has not been adequately resolved, we encourage you to send an email to training.ikeja@radissonblu.com. Our team is committed to ensuring that your concerns are addressed promptly and to your satisfaction.

We appreciate your understanding and hope to have the opportunity to provide you with a more positive experience in the future.

Best regards,

Krys Nwoye
On behalf of the Management & Team"}}

Krys Nwoye
